NL Query: List out the names of the guest houses and mention how many rooms are in each and how much they cost per night in addition to the full name of the manager.
SQL Query: select house_id as "ID", house_name as "Guest House Name", total_rooms as "Number of Rooms", room_rate as "Rate", u.name||' '||u.lastname as "Manager Name" from suo_guest_house_definition join users u on u.id = manager_id;

Schema.suo_guest_house_definition:
CREATE TABLE SUO_GUEST_HOUSE_DEFINITION 
   (	HOUSE_ID NUMBER(2,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	HOUSE_NAME VARCHAR2(20) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	DESCRIPTION VARCHAR2(50), 
	TOTAL_ROOMS NUMBER(2,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ROOM_RATE NUMBER(3,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	MANAGER_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(20) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- status: A = Available, N = Not Available
	NOTES VARCHAR2(200) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT HOUSE_PK PRIMARY KEY (HOUSE_ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT SUO_HOUSE_MNGRID_USERS_ID FOREIGN KEY (MANAGER_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);
   COMMENT ON COLUMN SUO_GUEST_HOUSE_DEFINITION.HOUSE_NAME IS 'Label=Guest House Name'
Schema.users:
CREATE TABLE USERS
   (	ID NUMBER, 
	NAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	EMAIL VARCHAR2(255), 
	URL VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1), 
	PASSWORD VARCHAR2(20), 
	MAILING VARCHAR2(1), -- mailing: Y = Yes, N = Not Included
	INS_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	PRIVACY VARCHAR2(1), 
	GENDER VARCHAR2(2), 
	NATIONALITY VARCHAR2(4), 
	BIRTH DATE, 
	COMP_1 VARCHAR2(2), 
	COMP_2 VARCHAR2(2), 
	RESEARCHER_TYPE VARCHAR2(4), -- researcher_type: Research Fellow = REF, Academic Staff = ACS, Post Doctoral Researcher = PDOC, Doctoral Research Student = DOCR, Master Research Student = MRS, Undergraduate Student = UND, Technician = TECH, SESAME Staff = SES
	NEW_USER VARCHAR2(2), 
	BIRTH_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	BIRTH_CNT_ID VARCHAR2(4), 
	HOME_ADDR VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_CNT_ID VARCHAR2(4), 
	HOME_ZIP VARCHAR2(10), 
	SAFETY_VIDEO DATE, 
	COD_FISCALE VARCHAR2(16), 
	BIRTH_PROVINCE VARCHAR2(2), 
	BIRTH_TOWN VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_PROVINCE VARCHAR2(2), 
	HOME_TOWN VARCHAR2(50), 
	IDSUBJECT VARCHAR2(16), 
	CREATION_DATE DATE, 
	LAST_ACCESS DATE, 
	EAAHASH VARCHAR2(40), 
	AUDIT_CHANGER NUMBER, 
	AUDIT_ADM_CHANGER NUMBER, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_USERS_STATU_000 CHECK (STATUS IN ('A', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT USR_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT USR_INS_FK FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE
);
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.ID IS 'Sequence=SEQ_USERS_ID,Label=User ID'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NAME IS 'Label=Name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.LASTNAME IS 'Label=Lastname'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.EMAIL IS 'Label=E-mail'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.URL IS 'Label=WWW Home Page'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.STATUS IS 'Label=Validation'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.PASSWORD IS 'Label=Password'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.MAILING IS 'Label=Included in mailing lists'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.INS_ID IS 'Label=Institute'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.GENDER IS 'Label=Gender,vallist=,M,F'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NATIONALITY IS 'Label=Present nationality,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH IS 'Label=Birth date '
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.COMP_1 IS 'Label=Competence 1,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY description'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.COMP_2 IS 'Label=Competence 2 List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY description'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.RESEARCHER_TYPE IS 'Label=Researcher type,deflist=Research Fellow,Academic Staff,Post Doctoral Researcher,Doctoral Research Student,Master Research Student,Undergraduate Student,Technician,SESAME Staff,vallist=REF,ACS,PDOC,DOCR,MRS,UND,TECH,SES'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NEW_USER IS 'Label=New user'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH_CITY IS 'Label=Birth place'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH_CNT_ID IS 'Label=Birth country,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_ADDR IS 'Label=Home address'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_CITY IS 'Label=City'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_CNT_ID IS 'Label=Country,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_ZIP IS 'Label=ZIP code'

NL Query: What is the total of all rooms included in all the guest houses
SQL Query: select sum(total_rooms) as "Total No. of Rooms" from suo_guest_house_definition;

NL Query: Which guest houses charge a rate over 20 per night? How many rooms are there in each of them?
SQL Query: select house_id as "ID", house_name as "Guest House Name", total_rooms as "Number of Rooms", room_rate as "Rate" from suo_guest_house_definition where room_rate > 20;

NL Query: Get the name of each guest house and its manager and check/show whether or not the manager is registered as a SESAME staff member (show that with a Yes or No)
SQL Query: select gh.house_id as "ID", gh.house_name as "Guest House Name", u.lastname as "Manager", (case when u.researcher_type = 'SES' then 'Yes' else 'No' end) as "SESAME Staff?" from suo_guest_house_definition gh join users u on u.id = gh.manager_id;

NL Query: Display the availability of each guest house (also showing how many rooms are in each and what are their rates)
SQL Query: select house_id as "ID", house_name as "Guest House Name", total_rooms as "Number of Rooms", room_rate as "Rate", decode(status, 'A', 'Available', 'N', 'Not Available') as "Availability" from suo_guest_house_definition;

NL Query: What are titles of the experiments 2 semesters ago in XAFS which ended up loosing more than half of their assigned hours to setup and unused hours due to machine failure or beam loss and what was their total lost time (as in the total of setup and unused hours) in comparison to the number of assigned hours.
SQL Query:
Select s.prop_id as "Proposal ID",
u.name ||' '|| u.lastname as "Proposer",
p.title as "Title",
(s.assigned_shifts * 8) as "Total Assigned Hours",
(s.setup_shifts + s.unusable_shifts) as "Total Hours Lost"
from summaries s
join users u on u.id = s.usr_id
join proposals p on p.id = s.prop_id
where (s.setup_shifts + s.unusable_shifts) > ((s.assigned_shifts * 8) / 2)
and s.bml_name = 'XAFS/XRF'
and p.semester = (select max(p1.semester)-2 from proposals p1);

Schema.proposals:
CREATE TABLE PROPOSALS
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	TITLE VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USER_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	RESEARCH_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	EU_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- EU_support: Y = Yes, N = No
	PHYSICS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- physics: Y = Yes, N = No
	CHEMISTRY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- chemistry: Y = Yes, N = No
	MEDICAL VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- medical: Y = Yes, N = No
	LIFE_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- life_sciences: Y = Yes, N = No
	TECH_INSTRUMENTATION VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- tech_instrumentation: Y = Yes, N = No
	OTHER VARCHAR2(50), 
	SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	PROPOSAL_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- proposal_category: C = Continuation, R = Resubmission, N = New
	APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), -- application_category: N =  Normal,  U = Urgent, L = Long Term
	ENERGY VARCHAR2(255), 
	RESOLUTION VARCHAR2(80), 
	OTHER_REQUIREMENTS VARCHAR2(255), 
	SAMPLE_TREATMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	AVAILABLE_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	ADDITIONAL_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(255), 
	OFFLINE_FACILITIES VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	LOCAL_CONTACT_ID NUMBER, 
	SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	PROP_SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	PREVIOUS_PROPCODE VARCHAR2(32), 
	EU_SUPPORTED VARCHAR2(1), 
	REALSHIFTS NUMBER, 
	DESCRIPTION CLOB, 
	CONTACT_NAME VARCHAR2(90), 
	EARTH_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1), 
	MATERIALS_SCIENCE VARCHAR2(1), 
	PHYSICAL_CHEM VARCHAR2(1), 
	INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION VARCHAR2(1), 
	INS_ID NUMBER, 
	CMT_ID VARCHAR2(30), 
	RESEARCH_AREA VARCHAR2(3), 
	ICTP_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1), 
	USR_LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	REQUIRED_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	FEASIBILITY VARCHAR2(1), -- feasibility: Y = Viable, N = Unfeasible, U = Conflicting, R = Feasible on required beamline, A = Feasible on alternative beamline
	REQ_ALT_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	BML_LOGICAL_OPERATOR VARCHAR2(3), 
	REQ_ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	REQ_APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ALLOCATION_MAIL VARCHAR2(1) DEFAULT null, 
	DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(2), 
	SUB_DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(8), 
	ACHIEVEMENTS CLOB, 
	SEMESTER NUMBER, 
	EU_SUPPORT_CRUCIAL VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULING VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULE_COUNTER NUMBER, 
	LONGTERM_COMMENTS VARCHAR2(220), 
	EMAIL_ACHIEV_EXPREP DATE, 
	EU_REFUNDABLE_DAYS NUMBER, 
	MONTHLY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ICTP_SUPPORTED NUMBER, 
	FACILITY VARCHAR2(1), 
	POLARIZATION VARCHAR2(4), 
	TUNABILITY NUMBER, 
	SAMPLE_TEMPERATURE NUMBER, 
	LAST_MINUTE VARCHAR2(1), 
	BIOSTRUCTX_CODE VARCHAR2(10), 
	IAEA VARCHAR2(1), 
	WAYFORLIGHTS VARCHAR2(1), 
	FERMI_MODE NUMBER, 
	ASSIGNMENT_MAIL VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_FUNDED VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_REQUEST VARCHAR2(20), 
	CULTURAL_HERITAGE VARCHAR2(1), 
	LAST_CHANGE DATE, 
	FUND_SOURCE NUMBER(4,0), 
	NOTES CLOB, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_TECH__000 CHECK (TECH_INSTRUMENTATION IN ('Y', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_RESEA_000 CHECK (RESEARCH_CATEGORY IN ('P','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PROPO_000 CHECK (PROPOSAL_CATEGORY IN ('C', 'R', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHYSI_000 CHECK (PHYSICS IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHCHE_000 CHECK (PHYSICAL_CHEM IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MEDIC_000 CHECK (MEDICAL IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MATER_000 CHECK (MATERIALS_SCIENCE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_LIFE__000 CHECK (LIFE_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_INDUS_000 CHECK (INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EU_SU_000 CHECK (EU_SUPPORT IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_ELECT_000 CHECK (ELECTRON_BEAM IN ('S','M','F')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EARTH_000 CHECK (EARTH_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_CHEMI_000 CHECK (CHEMISTRY IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_APPLI_000 CHECK (APPLICATION_CATEGORY IN ('N','U','L')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_FACILITY FOREIGN KEY (FACILITY)
	  REFERENCES FACILITIES (CODE) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (REQUIRED_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK2 FOREIGN KEY (REQ_ALT_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_INSTITUTES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_BML_FK FOREIGN KEY (BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_CONCTACT_IS_FK FOREIGN KEY (LOCAL_CONTACT_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.STATUS IS 'Label = Status, List= Select code, name from proposals_stataus'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY prio'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.SUB_DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Sub Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM sub_competence'

Schema.summaries:
CREATE TABLE SUMMARIES --Description: Shifts and hours summary completed experiments/proposals
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	SMR_BEGIN DATE NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	SMR_END DATE NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ASSIGNED_SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- assigned_shifts: Number of assigned shifts (conversion: 1 shift = 8 hours)
	SETUP_SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE,  -- setup_shifts: Total Setup Hours (not shifts)	(conversion: 8 hours = 1 shift)
	USABLE_SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- usable_shifts: Total Usable Hours (not shifts)	(conversion: 8 hours = 1 shift)

NL Query: Are there any proposals currently being evaluated by the LS committee which have been flagged as unfeasible or conflicting? Give me their titles and beamlines in addition to who submitted them
SQL Query:
Select p.id as "Proposal ID",
u.name || ' ' || u.lastname as "Proposer",
p.title as "Title",
decode(p.feasibility, NULL,'---','N','Unfeasible','U','Conflicting') AS "Feasibility",
nvl(p.bml_name, p.required_bml_name) as "Beamline"
from proposals p 
join users u on u.id = p.usr_id
where nvl(p.cmt_id, p.research_area) = 'LS'
and p.feasibility in ('N', 'U')
and p.status = 'E';

NL Query: In the MS beamline, has there ever been an experiment which was allocated more than 120 hours total and had no unused hours? What was it's title, and how many hours was the beamtime in total and during which semester was that?
SQL Query:
Select s.prop_id as "Proposal ID",
u.name ||' '|| u.lastname as "Proposer",
p.title as "Title",
p.semester as "Semester",
(s.assigned_shifts * 8) as "Total Assigned Hours"
from summaries s
join users u on u.id = s.usr_id
join proposals p on p.id = s.prop_id
where s.unusable_shifts = 0
and (s.assigned_shifts*8) > 120
and s.bml_name = 'MS/XPD';

Schema.summaries:
CREATE TABLE SUMMARIES --Description: Shifts and hours summary completed experiments/proposals
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	SMR_BEGIN DATE NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	SMR_END DATE NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ASSIGNED_SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- assigned_shifts: Number of assigned shifts (conversion: 1 shift = 8 hours)
	SETUP_SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE,  -- setup_shifts: Total Setup Hours (not shifts)	(conversion: 8 hours = 1 shift)
	USABLE_SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- usable_shifts: Total Usable Hours (not shifts)	(conversion: 8 hours = 1 shift)
	UNUSABLE_SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- unusable_shifts: Total Unuasable Hours (not shifts) (conversion: 8 hours = 1 shift)
	PROP_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER, 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1), 
	BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	SDATE DATE, 
	EVENT_ID NUMBER, 
	 CONSTRAINT SMR_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_SUMMARIES_PROP_ID FOREIGN KEY (PROP_ID)
	  REFERENCES PROPOSALS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT FK_SUMMARIES_USR_ID FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);

NL Query: List out this semester's proposals titles but only those which have 4 users (including the proposer) on the team. Along with that include the full name of the proposer and beamline of the proposal.
SQL Query:
select p.id as "Proposal",
u.name || ' ' || u.lastname as "Proposer",
p.title as "Title",
nvl(p.bml_name, p.required_bml_name) as "Beamline"
from proposals p
left join (select part.usr_id, part.prop_id from participants part
union
select p1.usr_id, p1.id from proposals p1) ap on ap.prop_id = p.id 
join users u on p.usr_id = u.id 
where p.semester = (select max(p1.semester) from proposals p1)
group by p.id, u.name, u.lastname, p.title, nvl(p.bml_name, p.required_bml_name)
having count(ap.usr_id) = 4;

Schema.participants:
CREATE TABLE PARTICIPANTS 
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	PROP_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER, 
	NAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	INSTITUTE_NAME VARCHAR2(255), 
	ADDRESS VARCHAR2(255), 
	INS_ID NUMBER, 
	 CONSTRAINT PARTICIPANTS_UK1 UNIQUE (PROP_ID, USR_ID, NAME)
    
	 CONSTRAINT PART_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT PARTICIPANTS_INSTITUTES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PART_PROP_FK FOREIGN KEY (PROP_ID)
	  REFERENCES PROPOSALS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PART_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) DISABLE
);
Schema.users:
CREATE TABLE USERS
   (	ID NUMBER, 
	NAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	EMAIL VARCHAR2(255), 
	URL VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1), 
	PASSWORD VARCHAR2(20), 
	MAILING VARCHAR2(1), -- mailing: Y = Yes, N = Not Included
	INS_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	PRIVACY VARCHAR2(1), 
	GENDER VARCHAR2(2), 
	NATIONALITY VARCHAR2(4), 
	BIRTH DATE, 
	COMP_1 VARCHAR2(2), 
	COMP_2 VARCHAR2(2), 
	RESEARCHER_TYPE VARCHAR2(4), -- researcher_type: Research Fellow = REF, Academic Staff = ACS, Post Doctoral Researcher = PDOC, Doctoral Research Student = DOCR, Master Research Student = MRS, Undergraduate Student = UND, Technician = TECH, SESAME Staff = SES
	NEW_USER VARCHAR2(2), 
	BIRTH_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	BIRTH_CNT_ID VARCHAR2(4), 
	HOME_ADDR VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_CNT_ID VARCHAR2(4), 
	HOME_ZIP VARCHAR2(10), 
	SAFETY_VIDEO DATE, 
	COD_FISCALE VARCHAR2(16), 
	BIRTH_PROVINCE VARCHAR2(2), 
	BIRTH_TOWN VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_PROVINCE VARCHAR2(2), 
	HOME_TOWN VARCHAR2(50), 
	IDSUBJECT VARCHAR2(16), 
	CREATION_DATE DATE, 
	LAST_ACCESS DATE, 
	EAAHASH VARCHAR2(40), 
	AUDIT_CHANGER NUMBER, 
	AUDIT_ADM_CHANGER NUMBER, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_USERS_STATU_000 CHECK (STATUS IN ('A', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT USR_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT USR_INS_FK FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE
);
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.ID IS 'Sequence=SEQ_USERS_ID,Label=User ID'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NAME IS 'Label=Name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.LASTNAME IS 'Label=Lastname'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.EMAIL IS 'Label=E-mail'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.URL IS 'Label=WWW Home Page'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.STATUS IS 'Label=Validation'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.PASSWORD IS 'Label=Password'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.MAILING IS 'Label=Included in mailing lists'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.INS_ID IS 'Label=Institute'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.GENDER IS 'Label=Gender,vallist=,M,F'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NATIONALITY IS 'Label=Present nationality,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH IS 'Label=Birth date '
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.COMP_1 IS 'Label=Competence 1,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY description'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.COMP_2 IS 'Label=Competence 2 List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY description'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.RESEARCHER_TYPE IS 'Label=Researcher type,deflist=Research Fellow,Academic Staff,Post Doctoral Researcher,Doctoral Research Student,Master Research Student,Undergraduate Student,Technician,SESAME Staff,vallist=REF,ACS,PDOC,DOCR,MRS,UND,TECH,SES'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NEW_USER IS 'Label=New user'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH_CITY IS 'Label=Birth place'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH_CNT_ID IS 'Label=Birth country,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_ADDR IS 'Label=Home address'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_CITY IS 'Label=City'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_CNT_ID IS 'Label=Country,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_ZIP IS 'Label=ZIP code'
Schema.proposals:
CREATE TABLE PROPOSALS
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	TITLE VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USER_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	RESEARCH_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	EU_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- EU_support: Y = Yes, N = No
	PHYSICS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- physics: Y = Yes, N = No
	CHEMISTRY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- chemistry: Y = Yes, N = No
	MEDICAL VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- medical: Y = Yes, N = No
	LIFE_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- life_sciences: Y = Yes, N = No
	TECH_INSTRUMENTATION VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- tech_instrumentation: Y = Yes, N = No
	OTHER VARCHAR2(50), 
	SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	PROPOSAL_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- proposal_category: C = Continuation, R = Resubmission, N = New
	APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), -- application_category: N =  Normal,  U = Urgent, L = Long Term
	ENERGY VARCHAR2(255), 
	RESOLUTION VARCHAR2(80), 
	OTHER_REQUIREMENTS VARCHAR2(255), 
	SAMPLE_TREATMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	AVAILABLE_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	ADDITIONAL_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(255), 
	OFFLINE_FACILITIES VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	LOCAL_CONTACT_ID NUMBER, 
	SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	PROP_SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	PREVIOUS_PROPCODE VARCHAR2(32), 
	EU_SUPPORTED VARCHAR2(1), 
	REALSHIFTS NUMBER, 
	DESCRIPTION CLOB, 
	CONTACT_NAME VARCHAR2(90), 
	EARTH_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1), 
	MATERIALS_SCIENCE VARCHAR2(1), 
	PHYSICAL_CHEM VARCHAR2(1), 
	INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION VARCHAR2(1), 
	INS_ID NUMBER, 
	CMT_ID VARCHAR2(30), 
	RESEARCH_AREA VARCHAR2(3), 
	ICTP_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1), 
	USR_LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	REQUIRED_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	FEASIBILITY VARCHAR2(1), -- feasibility: Y = Viable, N = Unfeasible, U = Conflicting, R = Feasible on required beamline, A = Feasible on alternative beamline
	REQ_ALT_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	BML_LOGICAL_OPERATOR VARCHAR2(3), 
	REQ_ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	REQ_APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ALLOCATION_MAIL VARCHAR2(1) DEFAULT null, 
	DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(2), 
	SUB_DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(8), 
	ACHIEVEMENTS CLOB, 
	SEMESTER NUMBER, 
	EU_SUPPORT_CRUCIAL VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULING VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULE_COUNTER NUMBER, 
	LONGTERM_COMMENTS VARCHAR2(220), 
	EMAIL_ACHIEV_EXPREP DATE, 
	EU_REFUNDABLE_DAYS NUMBER, 
	MONTHLY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ICTP_SUPPORTED NUMBER, 
	FACILITY VARCHAR2(1), 
	POLARIZATION VARCHAR2(4), 
	TUNABILITY NUMBER, 
	SAMPLE_TEMPERATURE NUMBER, 
	LAST_MINUTE VARCHAR2(1), 
	BIOSTRUCTX_CODE VARCHAR2(10), 
	IAEA VARCHAR2(1), 
	WAYFORLIGHTS VARCHAR2(1), 
	FERMI_MODE NUMBER, 
	ASSIGNMENT_MAIL VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_FUNDED VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_REQUEST VARCHAR2(20), 
	CULTURAL_HERITAGE VARCHAR2(1), 
	LAST_CHANGE DATE, 
	FUND_SOURCE NUMBER(4,0), 
	NOTES CLOB, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_TECH__000 CHECK (TECH_INSTRUMENTATION IN ('Y', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_RESEA_000 CHECK (RESEARCH_CATEGORY IN ('P','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PROPO_000 CHECK (PROPOSAL_CATEGORY IN ('C', 'R', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHYSI_000 CHECK (PHYSICS IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHCHE_000 CHECK (PHYSICAL_CHEM IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MEDIC_000 CHECK (MEDICAL IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MATER_000 CHECK (MATERIALS_SCIENCE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_LIFE__000 CHECK (LIFE_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_INDUS_000 CHECK (INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EU_SU_000 CHECK (EU_SUPPORT IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_ELECT_000 CHECK (ELECTRON_BEAM IN ('S','M','F')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EARTH_000 CHECK (EARTH_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_CHEMI_000 CHECK (CHEMISTRY IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_APPLI_000 CHECK (APPLICATION_CATEGORY IN ('N','U','L')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_FACILITY FOREIGN KEY (FACILITY)
	  REFERENCES FACILITIES (CODE) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (REQUIRED_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK2 FOREIGN KEY (REQ_ALT_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_INSTITUTES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_BML_FK FOREIGN KEY (BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_CONCTACT_IS_FK FOREIGN KEY (LOCAL_CONTACT_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.STATUS IS 'Label = Status, List= Select code, name from proposals_stataus'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY prio'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.SUB_DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Sub Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM sub_competence'

NL Query: What was the total unused hours out of all experiments done at the IR during thein each of the very first 2 semesters also include the number of the semester?
SQL Query:
Select p.semester as "Semester",
sum(s.unusable_shifts) as "Total Unused Hours"
from summaries s
join proposals p on p.id = s.prop_id
where s.bml_name = 'IR'
and p.semester between (select min(p1.semester) from proposals p1) and (select min(p1.semester)+ 1 from proposals p1)
group by p.semester;

Schema.summaries:
CREATE TABLE SUMMARIES --Description: Shifts and hours summary completed experiments/proposals
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	SMR_BEGIN DATE NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	SMR_END DATE NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ASSIGNED_SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- assigned_shifts: Number of assigned shifts (conversion: 1 shift = 8 hours)
	SETUP_SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE,  -- setup_shifts: Total Setup Hours (not shifts)	(conversion: 8 hours = 1 shift)
	USABLE_SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- usable_shifts: Total Usable Hours (not shifts)	(conversion: 8 hours = 1 shift)
	UNUSABLE_SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- unusable_shifts: Total Unuasable Hours (not shifts) (conversion: 8 hours = 1 shift)
	PROP_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER, 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1), 
	BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	SDATE DATE, 
	EVENT_ID NUMBER, 
	 CONSTRAINT SMR_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_SUMMARIES_PROP_ID FOREIGN KEY (PROP_ID)
	  REFERENCES PROPOSALS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT FK_SUMMARIES_USR_ID FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);

NL Query: Show the current status of all the industry related proposals sent in this semester and mention the name of the proposer and the title and hosting beamline as well.
SQL Query:
Select p.id as "Proposal",
u.name ||' '||u.lastname as "Proposer",
p.title as "Title",
nvl(p.bml_name, p.required_bml_name) as "Beamline",
ps.name as "Status"
from proposals p
join users u on u.id = p.usr_id
join proposals_status ps on ps.code = p.status
where p.industry_collaboration = 'Y'
and p.semester = (select max(p1.semester) from proposals p1);

NL Query: What is the full name of all the undergrads who are registered in the system as users and what is their nationality?
SQL Query:
Select u.id as "User ID",
u.name ||' '||u.lastname as "User",
c.name as "Nationality"
from users u 
join countries c on c.code = u.nationality
where u.researcher_type = 'UND';

NL Query: Are the any master's students who have applied to attend the latest user's meeting, name them in addition to mentioning which institute are they affiliated with and what country is it in and whether it's a University or anothertype of institute, if so show what type?
SQL Query:
Select u.id as "User ID",
u.name ||' '||u.lastname as "User",
c.name as "Nationality",
i.name as "Institute",
i.cnt_name as "Institute Country",
val.description as "Institute Type"
from users u 
join countries c on c.code = u.nationality
join sup_events_pp um on um.usr_id = u.id
join institutes i on i.id = u.ins_id
join list_of_values val on val.code = i.ins_type and val.list = 'InstituteType'
where u.researcher_type = 'MRS';

NL Query: What is the total number of proposals scheduled by each committee the previous semester and what was the average score for the proposals under each one?
SQL Query:
Select nvl(p.cmt_id, p.research_area) as "Committee",
count(p.id) as "No. of Proposals",
trunc(avg(ev.final_score),2) as "Avg Score"
from proposals p
join evaluations ev on ev.prop_id = p.id and ev.evlt_id = 3
where p.semester = (select max(p1.semester)-1 from proposals p1)
and p.status = 'S'
group by nvl(p.cmt_id, p.research_area);

NL Query: How many proposals where under each discipline category in the past semester but only including those which were rejected or deleted by the user only?
SQL Query:
Select comp.description as "Discipline",
count(p.id) as "No. of Proposals"
from proposals p
join competence comp on comp.code = p.discipline 
where p.semester = (select max(p1.semester)-1 from proposals p1)
and p.status in ('N', 'c')
group by comp.description;

NL Query: List out the names of the users who have requested access to one of the facility's labs during the periods between March and May of 2024 or October and December of 2023. Also show if their request was processed and accepted or not, the date they arrived in, the beamline their applying to, only the id of their proposal and their request id.
SQL Query:
Select a.access_id as "Access ID",
a.prop_id as "Proposal ID",
u.name ||' '|| u.lastname as "User",
a.arrival as "Date of Arrival",
a.bml_name as "Beamline",
val.description as "Status"
from accesses a 
join users u on u.id = a.usr_id
join list_of_values val on val.code = a.status and val.list = 'AccessStatus'
where a.arrival between TO_DATE('01/03/24', 'DD/MM/YY') and TO_DATE('31/05/24', 'DD/MM/YY')
or a.arrival between TO_DATE('01/10/23', 'DD/MM/YY') and TO_DATE('31/12/23', 'DD/MM/YY')
order by a.arrival;

NL Query: Could you find the full name, affiliation, type of institute the affiliation is and country of origin (of both the user and the affiliation) in addition to the email and type of researcher each one of the users who have participated by either being the submitter or a part of a proposal or experiment team or attended the 17th users meeting and categorizing them by whether they only took part in experiments /proposals/beamtimes (counted as one and label it "Proposal") or only by attending the 17th users' meeting (label it as "User Meeting 17") or both (label it as "Both").
SQL Query:
Select distinct u.id as "User ID",
u.name ||' '|| u.lastname as "User",
c.name as "Nationality",
i.name as "Institute",
i.cnt_name as "Institute Country",
u.email as "E-mail",
decode(u.researcher_type,'REF', 'Research Fellow', 'ACS', 'Academic Staff', 'PDOC', 'Post Doctoral Researcher', 'DOCR', 'Doctoral Research Student', 'MRS', 'Master Research Student', 'UND', 'Undergraduate Student', 'TECH', 'Technician', 'SES', 'SESAME Staff') as "Researcher Type",
case 
when (p.usr_id is not null or par.usr_id is not null)and um17.usr_id is null
then 'Proposal'
when (p.usr_id is null and par.usr_id is null)and um17.usr_id is not null
then 'User Meeting 17' 
when (p.usr_id is not null or par.usr_id is not null) and um17.usr_id is not null
then 'Both'
end as "Type of Participation"
from users u
join institutes i on i.id = u.ins_id
join countries c on c.code = u.nationality
left join proposals p on p.usr_id = u.id
left join participants par on par.usr_id = u.id
left join sup_events_pp_17th_um um17 on um17.usr_id = u.id
where p.usr_id is not null 
or par.usr_id is not null 
or um17.usr_id is not null;

   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	PROP_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER, 
	NAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	INSTITUTE_NAME VARCHAR2(255), 
	ADDRESS VARCHAR2(255), 
	INS_ID NUMBER, 
	 CONSTRAINT PARTICIPANTS_UK1 UNIQUE (PROP_ID, USR_ID, NAME)
    
	 CONSTRAINT PART_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT PARTICIPANTS_INSTITUTES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PART_PROP_FK FOREIGN KEY (PROP_ID)
	  REFERENCES PROPOSALS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PART_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) DISABLE
);
Schema.countries:
CREATE TABLE COUNTRIES 
   (	NAME VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CODE VARCHAR2(4) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	EU VARCHAR2(1), 
	IBAN_LEN NUMBER, 
	CONT_CODE VARCHAR2(2), 
	ACCOUNT_POSITION NUMBER, 
	ACCOUNT_LENGTH NUMBER, 
	CERIC VARCHAR2(1), 
	 CONSTRAINT CNT_PK PRIMARY KEY (CODE, NAME)
);
   COMMENT ON COLUMN COUNTRIES.NAME IS 'Label=Country'
Schema.institutes:
CREATE TABLE INSTITUTES 
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	NAME VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ADDRESS VARCHAR2(160) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CNT_NAME VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CITY VARCHAR2(40), 
	ZIP VARCHAR2(20) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	INS_TYPE VARCHAR2(3), 
	MODIF_USR_ID NUMBER, 
	MODIF_DATE DATE, 
	STATE_PROV VARCHAR2(40), 
	ITALIAN_PROV VARCHAR2(2), 
	ITALIAN_CITY VARCHAR2(40), 
	END_DATE DATE, 
	PEC VARCHAR2(60), 
	NOTES VARCHAR2(2000), 
	EMAIL VARCHAR2(60), 
	 CONSTRAINT INS_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.ID IS 'Sequence=SEQ_USERS_ID,Label=Institute'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.NAME IS 'Label=Institute name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.ADDRESS IS 'Label=Address'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.CNT_NAME IS 'Label=Country,List=SELECT NAME AS A FROM COUNTRIES'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.CITY IS 'Label=City'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.ZIP IS 'Label=Zip code'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.INS_TYPE IS 'Label=Institute Type, List=select code, description from list_of_values where list = ''InstituteType'''
Schema.proposals:
CREATE TABLE PROPOSALS
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	TITLE VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USER_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	RESEARCH_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	EU_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- EU_support: Y = Yes, N = No
	PHYSICS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- physics: Y = Yes, N = No
	CHEMISTRY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- chemistry: Y = Yes, N = No
	MEDICAL VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- medical: Y = Yes, N = No
	LIFE_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- life_sciences: Y = Yes, N = No
	TECH_INSTRUMENTATION VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- tech_instrumentation: Y = Yes, N = No
	OTHER VARCHAR2(50), 
	SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	PROPOSAL_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- proposal_category: C = Continuation, R = Resubmission, N = New
	APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), -- application_category: N =  Normal,  U = Urgent, L = Long Term
	ENERGY VARCHAR2(255), 
	RESOLUTION VARCHAR2(80), 
	OTHER_REQUIREMENTS VARCHAR2(255), 
	SAMPLE_TREATMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	AVAILABLE_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	ADDITIONAL_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(255), 
	OFFLINE_FACILITIES VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	LOCAL_CONTACT_ID NUMBER, 
	SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	PROP_SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	PREVIOUS_PROPCODE VARCHAR2(32), 
	EU_SUPPORTED VARCHAR2(1), 
	REALSHIFTS NUMBER, 
	DESCRIPTION CLOB, 
	CONTACT_NAME VARCHAR2(90), 
	EARTH_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1), 
	MATERIALS_SCIENCE VARCHAR2(1), 
	PHYSICAL_CHEM VARCHAR2(1), 
	INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION VARCHAR2(1), 
	INS_ID NUMBER, 
	CMT_ID VARCHAR2(30), 
	RESEARCH_AREA VARCHAR2(3), 
	ICTP_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1), 
	USR_LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	REQUIRED_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	FEASIBILITY VARCHAR2(1), -- feasibility: Y = Viable, N = Unfeasible, U = Conflicting, R = Feasible on required beamline, A = Feasible on alternative beamline
	REQ_ALT_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	BML_LOGICAL_OPERATOR VARCHAR2(3), 
	REQ_ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	REQ_APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ALLOCATION_MAIL VARCHAR2(1) DEFAULT null, 
	DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(2), 
	SUB_DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(8), 
	ACHIEVEMENTS CLOB, 
	SEMESTER NUMBER, 
	EU_SUPPORT_CRUCIAL VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULING VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULE_COUNTER NUMBER, 
	LONGTERM_COMMENTS VARCHAR2(220), 
	EMAIL_ACHIEV_EXPREP DATE, 
	EU_REFUNDABLE_DAYS NUMBER, 
	MONTHLY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ICTP_SUPPORTED NUMBER, 
	FACILITY VARCHAR2(1), 
	POLARIZATION VARCHAR2(4), 
	TUNABILITY NUMBER, 
	SAMPLE_TEMPERATURE NUMBER, 
	LAST_MINUTE VARCHAR2(1), 
	BIOSTRUCTX_CODE VARCHAR2(10), 
	IAEA VARCHAR2(1), 
	WAYFORLIGHTS VARCHAR2(1), 
	FERMI_MODE NUMBER, 
	ASSIGNMENT_MAIL VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_FUNDED VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_REQUEST VARCHAR2(20), 
	CULTURAL_HERITAGE VARCHAR2(1), 
	LAST_CHANGE DATE, 
	FUND_SOURCE NUMBER(4,0), 
	NOTES CLOB, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_TECH__000 CHECK (TECH_INSTRUMENTATION IN ('Y', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_RESEA_000 CHECK (RESEARCH_CATEGORY IN ('P','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PROPO_000 CHECK (PROPOSAL_CATEGORY IN ('C', 'R', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHYSI_000 CHECK (PHYSICS IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHCHE_000 CHECK (PHYSICAL_CHEM IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MEDIC_000 CHECK (MEDICAL IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MATER_000 CHECK (MATERIALS_SCIENCE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_LIFE__000 CHECK (LIFE_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_INDUS_000 CHECK (INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EU_SU_000 CHECK (EU_SUPPORT IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_ELECT_000 CHECK (ELECTRON_BEAM IN ('S','M','F')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EARTH_000 CHECK (EARTH_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_CHEMI_000 CHECK (CHEMISTRY IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_APPLI_000 CHECK (APPLICATION_CATEGORY IN ('N','U','L')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_FACILITY FOREIGN KEY (FACILITY)
	  REFERENCES FACILITIES (CODE) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (REQUIRED_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK2 FOREIGN KEY (REQ_ALT_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_INSTITUTES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_BML_FK FOREIGN KEY (BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_CONCTACT_IS_FK FOREIGN KEY (LOCAL_CONTACT_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.STATUS IS 'Label = Status, List= Select code, name from proposals_stataus'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY prio'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.SUB_DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Sub Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM sub_competence'

NL Query: Regarding the publications which are results of proposals, create a list of the title of the publications of these proposals only including those which were carried out in either the 3rd and 4th semester and under the XAFS beamline and show which year was the proposal submitted in and which year was the publication out
SQL Query:
Select pub.pbl_id as "Publication ID",
pub.title as "Publication Title",
pub.year as "Year of Publication",
extract(year from p.submission_date) as "Year of Proposal Submission",
p.semester as "Proposal Semester"
from publi pub 
join publi_items item on pub.pbl_id = item.pbl_id and item.item_type = 'PRP'
join proposals p on p.id = to_number(item.code)
where p.semester in (3,4)
and nvl(p.bml_name, p.required_bml_name) = 'XAFS/XRF';

Schema.publi_items:
CREATE TABLE PUBLI_ITEMS
   (	PBL_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CODE VARCHAR2(30) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- code: LAB = Lab, USG = Beamline, PRP = Proposal
	ITEM_TYPE VARCHAR2(3) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ITEM_ORD NUMBER(38,0), 
	 CONSTRAINT PUBLI_ITEMS_PK PRIMARY KEY (PBL_ID, CODE)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_PUBLI_ITEMS_PUBLI_PBL_ID FOREIGN KEY (PBL_ID)
	  REFERENCES PUBLI (PBL_ID) ON DELETE CASCADE ENABLE
);

NL Query: Give me a report on all the new proposals which are either a resubmission or continuation of previous proposals, include the new proposal's proposer name, its title. Also include the beamline and status of both the current and previous one in addition to the semester of the previous one only and differentiate whether the new proposal is a continuation or a resubmission.
SQL Query:
Select p.id as "Proposal ID",
u.name ||' '|| u.lastname as "Proposer",
p.title as "Title",
decode(p.proposal_category, 'C', 'Continuation', 'R', 'Resubmission') as "Category",
nvl(p.bml_name, p.required_bml_name) as "Current Beamline",
nvl(pr.bml_name, pr.required_bml_name) as "Previous Beamline",
(select name from proposals_status where code=p.status) as "Current Status",
(select name from proposals_status where code=pr.status) AS "Previous Status",
pr.semester as "Previous Semester"
from proposals p
join proposals pr on pr.id = p.previous_propcode and p.proposal_category in ('C', 'R')
join users u on u.id = p.usr_id
where p.semester = (select max(p1.semester) from proposals p1);

Schema.users:
CREATE TABLE USERS
   (	ID NUMBER, 
	NAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	EMAIL VARCHAR2(255), 
	URL VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1), 
	PASSWORD VARCHAR2(20), 
	MAILING VARCHAR2(1), -- mailing: Y = Yes, N = Not Included
	INS_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	PRIVACY VARCHAR2(1), 
	GENDER VARCHAR2(2), 
	NATIONALITY VARCHAR2(4), 
	BIRTH DATE, 
	COMP_1 VARCHAR2(2), 
	COMP_2 VARCHAR2(2), 
	RESEARCHER_TYPE VARCHAR2(4), -- researcher_type: Research Fellow = REF, Academic Staff = ACS, Post Doctoral Researcher = PDOC, Doctoral Research Student = DOCR, Master Research Student = MRS, Undergraduate Student = UND, Technician = TECH, SESAME Staff = SES
	NEW_USER VARCHAR2(2), 
	BIRTH_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	BIRTH_CNT_ID VARCHAR2(4), 
	HOME_ADDR VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_CNT_ID VARCHAR2(4), 
	HOME_ZIP VARCHAR2(10), 
	SAFETY_VIDEO DATE, 
	COD_FISCALE VARCHAR2(16), 
	BIRTH_PROVINCE VARCHAR2(2), 
	BIRTH_TOWN VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_PROVINCE VARCHAR2(2), 
	HOME_TOWN VARCHAR2(50), 
	IDSUBJECT VARCHAR2(16), 
	CREATION_DATE DATE, 
	LAST_ACCESS DATE, 
	EAAHASH VARCHAR2(40), 
	AUDIT_CHANGER NUMBER, 
	AUDIT_ADM_CHANGER NUMBER, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_USERS_STATU_000 CHECK (STATUS IN ('A', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT USR_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT USR_INS_FK FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE
);
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.ID IS 'Sequence=SEQ_USERS_ID,Label=User ID'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NAME IS 'Label=Name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.LASTNAME IS 'Label=Lastname'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.EMAIL IS 'Label=E-mail'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.URL IS 'Label=WWW Home Page'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.STATUS IS 'Label=Validation'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.PASSWORD IS 'Label=Password'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.MAILING IS 'Label=Included in mailing lists'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.INS_ID IS 'Label=Institute'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.GENDER IS 'Label=Gender,vallist=,M,F'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NATIONALITY IS 'Label=Present nationality,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH IS 'Label=Birth date '
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.COMP_1 IS 'Label=Competence 1,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY description'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.COMP_2 IS 'Label=Competence 2 List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY description'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.RESEARCHER_TYPE IS 'Label=Researcher type,deflist=Research Fellow,Academic Staff,Post Doctoral Researcher,Doctoral Research Student,Master Research Student,Undergraduate Student,Technician,SESAME Staff,vallist=REF,ACS,PDOC,DOCR,MRS,UND,TECH,SES'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NEW_USER IS 'Label=New user'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH_CITY IS 'Label=Birth place'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH_CNT_ID IS 'Label=Birth country,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_ADDR IS 'Label=Home address'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_CITY IS 'Label=City'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_CNT_ID IS 'Label=Country,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_ZIP IS 'Label=ZIP code'

CREATE TABLE PROPOSALS
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	TITLE VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USER_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	RESEARCH_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	EU_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- EU_support: Y = Yes, N = No
	PHYSICS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- physics: Y = Yes, N = No
	CHEMISTRY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- chemistry: Y = Yes, N = No
	MEDICAL VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- medical: Y = Yes, N = No
	LIFE_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- life_sciences: Y = Yes, N = No
	TECH_INSTRUMENTATION VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- tech_instrumentation: Y = Yes, N = No
	OTHER VARCHAR2(50), 
	SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	PROPOSAL_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- proposal_category: C = Continuation, R = Resubmission, N = New
	APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), -- application_category: N =  Normal,  U = Urgent, L = Long Term
	ENERGY VARCHAR2(255), 
	RESOLUTION VARCHAR2(80), 
	OTHER_REQUIREMENTS VARCHAR2(255), 
	SAMPLE_TREATMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	AVAILABLE_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	ADDITIONAL_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(255), 
	OFFLINE_FACILITIES VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	LOCAL_CONTACT_ID NUMBER, 
	SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	PROP_SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	PREVIOUS_PROPCODE VARCHAR2(32), 
	EU_SUPPORTED VARCHAR2(1), 
	REALSHIFTS NUMBER, 
	DESCRIPTION CLOB, 
	CONTACT_NAME VARCHAR2(90), 
	EARTH_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1), 
	MATERIALS_SCIENCE VARCHAR2(1),

	RESEARCH_AREA VARCHAR2(3), 
	ICTP_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1), 
	USR_LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40),

	FEASIBILITY VARCHAR2(1), -- feasibility: Y = Viable, N = Unfeasible, U = Conflicting, R = Feasible on required beamline, A = Feasible on alternative beamline
	REQ_ALT_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	BML_LOGICAL_OPERATOR VARCHAR2(3), 
	REQ_ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	REQ_APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ALLOCATION_MAIL VARCHAR2(1) DEFAULT null, 
	DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(2), 
	SUB_DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(8), 
	ACHIEVEMENTS CLOB, 
	SEMESTER NUMBER, 
	EU_SUPPORT_CRUCIAL VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULING VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULE_COUNTER NUMBER, 
	LONGTERM_COMMENTS VARCHAR2(220), 
	EMAIL_ACHIEV_EXPREP DATE, 
	EU_REFUNDABLE_DAYS NUMBER, 
	MONTHLY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ICTP_SUPPORTED NUMBER, 
	FACILITY VARCHAR2(1), 
	POLARIZATION VARCHAR2(4), 
	TUNABILITY NUMBER, 
	SAMPLE_TEMPERATURE NUMBER, 
	LAST_MINUTE VARCHAR2(1), 
	BIOSTRUCTX_CODE VARCHAR2(10), 
	IAEA VARCHAR2(1), 
	WAYFORLIGHTS VARCHAR2(1), 
	FERMI_MODE NUMBER, 
	ASSIGNMENT_MAIL VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_FUNDED VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_REQUEST VARCHAR2(20), 
	CULTURAL_HERITAGE VARCHAR2(1), 
	LAST_CHANGE DATE, 
	FUND_SOURCE NUMBER(4,0), 
	NOTES CLOB, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_TECH__000 CHECK (TECH_INSTRUMENTATION IN ('Y', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_RESEA_000 CHECK (RESEARCH_CATEGORY IN ('P','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PROPO_000 CHECK (PROPOSAL_CATEGORY IN ('C', 'R', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHYSI_000 CHECK (PHYSICS IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHCHE_000 CHECK (PHYSICAL_CHEM IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MEDIC_000 CHECK (MEDICAL IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MATER_000 CHECK (MATERIALS_SCIENCE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_LIFE__000 CHECK (LIFE_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_INDUS_000 CHECK (INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EU_SU_000 CHECK (EU_SUPPORT IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_ELECT_000 CHECK (ELECTRON_BEAM IN ('S','M','F')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EARTH_000 CHECK (EARTH_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_CHEMI_000 CHECK (CHEMISTRY IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_APPLI_000 CHECK (APPLICATION_CATEGORY IN ('N','U','L')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_FACILITY FOREIGN KEY (FACILITY)
	  REFERENCES FACILITIES (CODE) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (REQUIRED_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK2 FOREIGN KEY (REQ_ALT_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_INSTITUTES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_BML_FK FOREIGN KEY (BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_CONCTACT_IS_FK FOREIGN KEY (LOCAL_CONTACT_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.STATUS IS 'Label = Status, List= Select code, name from proposals_stataus'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY prio'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.SUB_DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Sub Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM sub_competence'

NL Query: Show the current status of all the industry collaboration proposals sent in during the seventh semster and mention their title only.
SQL Query:
Select p.id as "Proposal ID",
p.title as "Title",
ps.name as "Status"
from proposals p
join proposals_status ps on ps.code = p.status
where p.semester = 7
and p.industry_collaboration = 'Y';

NL Query: Compare the number of scheduled proposals to the number of all the proposals per each country (where the country is the country of the institute not the nationality of the users) in all semesters .
SQL Query:
Select i.cnt_name as "Country",
count(case when p.status = 'S' then p.id end) as "Scheduled Proposals",
count(p.id) as "All Proposals"
from proposals p
join institutes i on i.id = p.ins_id
group by i.cnt_name;

Schema.institutes:
CREATE TABLE INSTITUTES 
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	NAME VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ADDRESS VARCHAR2(160) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CNT_NAME VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CITY VARCHAR2(40), 
	ZIP VARCHAR2(20) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	INS_TYPE VARCHAR2(3), 
	MODIF_USR_ID NUMBER, 
	MODIF_DATE DATE, 
	STATE_PROV VARCHAR2(40), 
	ITALIAN_PROV VARCHAR2(2), 
	ITALIAN_CITY VARCHAR2(40), 
	END_DATE DATE, 
	PEC VARCHAR2(60), 
	NOTES VARCHAR2(2000), 
	EMAIL VARCHAR2(60), 
	 CONSTRAINT INS_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.ID IS 'Sequence=SEQ_USERS_ID,Label=Institute'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.NAME IS 'Label=Institute name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.ADDRESS IS 'Label=Address'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.CNT_NAME IS 'Label=Country,List=SELECT NAME AS A FROM COUNTRIES'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.CITY IS 'Label=City'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.ZIP IS 'Label=Zip code'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.INS_TYPE IS 'Label=Institute Type, List=select code, description from list_of_values where list = ''InstituteType'''

NL Query: Are there any publications (which have been validates/published) as a journal or conference or thesis publication which do not have a doi link? If so please list the title and the year of publication of each.
SQL Query:
Select pbl_id as "Publication ID",
title as "Title",
year as "Year"
from publi 
where doi is null
and status = 'Y';

Schema.publi:
CREATE TABLE PUBLI --Description = Publication details 
   (	PBL_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	TITLE VARCHAR2(1024), 
	CATEGORY VARCHAR2(64) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	WORK_DONE_ELE CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'N' NOT NULL ENABLE, -- work_done_ele: Y= Yes, P = 'Yes, only in part', N = No
	ELE_AUTHOR CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'N' NOT NULL ENABLE, -- ele_author: Y = Yes, N = No
	JOURNAL_NAME VARCHAR2(128), 
	VOLUME VARCHAR2(128), 
	ISSUE VARCHAR2(32), 
	QTR VARCHAR2(20), 
	YEAR NUMBER, 
	BEAM_1 VARCHAR2(30), 
	BEAM_2 VARCHAR2(30), 
	BEAM_3 VARCHAR2(30), 
	BEAM_4 VARCHAR2(30), 
	PROP_1 NUMBER, 
	PROP_2 NUMBER, 
	PROP_3 NUMBER, 
	PROP_4 NUMBER, 
	COMMENTS VARCHAR2(1024), 
	EMAIL VARCHAR2(255), 
	PHONE VARCHAR2(50), 
	ELE_NUM VARCHAR2(20), 
	THES_TYPE VARCHAR2(30), 
	INSTITUTION VARCHAR2(50), 
	CITY_PUB VARCHAR2(30), 
	COUNTRY_PUB VARCHAR2(30), 
	PATENT_NUMB VARCHAR2(30), 
	REVIEW VARCHAR2(50), 
	PUB_TYPE VARCHAR2(50), 
	REVISION VARCHAR2(30), 
	BOOK_TITLE VARCHAR2(255), 
	PUBLISHER VARCHAR2(100), 
	EDITION VARCHAR2(50), 
	CONFERENCE VARCHAR2(128), 
	PBL_TYPE CHAR(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- pbl_type: B=Book or Book Chapter, C=Conference Presentations, G=SESAME Highlights, I=Internal SESAME Staff Reports, J=Journal Article, P=Patent, R=Contributed News Articles, Book Reviews, T=Thesis
	STATUS CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'N' NOT NULL ENABLE, -- status: Y =  Validated, N = Submitted 
	EDITOR VARCHAR2(50), 
	ADVISOR VARCHAR2(50), 
	DAY NUMBER, 
	PRES_TYPE VARCHAR2(10), 
	FPAGE VARCHAR2(10), 
	UE_SUPPORT CHAR(1), 
	ICTP_SUPPORT CHAR(1), 
	OTHER VARCHAR2(256), 
	SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER, 
	OTHER_BEAM VARCHAR2(30), 
	OTHER_LAB VARCHAR2(50), 
	OTHER_PUBLI_NAME VARCHAR2(128), 
	CONF_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	CONF_COUNTRY VARCHAR2(40), 
	CONF_DATE DATE, 
	URL VARCHAR2(2000), 
	DOI VARCHAR2(4000), 
	REVIEW_PANEL VARCHAR2(20), 
	IN_HOUSE VARCHAR2(20), 
	COLLABORATION VARCHAR2(20),

NL Query: What are the names of the first 15 users to register in the system and when did they create their accounts, also show the institute they're affiliated with and where it is and what is their position /researcher type (as in students, postdocs, research fellows .. etc)?
SQL Query:
Select * from
(Select u.id as "User ID",
u.name || ' ' ||u.lastname as "User",
i.name as "Institute",
i.cnt_name as "Country", u.creation_date as "Creation Date",
decode(u.researcher_type,'REF', 'Research Fellow', 'ACS', 'Academic Staff', 'PDOC', 'Post Doctoral Researcher', 'DOCR', 'Doctoral Research Student', 'MRS', 'Master Research Student', 'UND', 'Undergraduate Student', 'TECH', 'Technician', 'SES', 'SESAME Staff') as "Researcher Type"
from users u 
join institutes i on i.id = u.ins_id
order by u.creation_date)where rownum <= 15;

NL Query: Who are the users who have never partaken in any proposals or beamtimes and from which institute are they and have they attended the latest user's meetings (only indicate this by a Y for yes and N for no)
SQL Query:
Select u.id as "User ID",
u.name || ' ' ||u.lastname as "User",
i.name as "Institute",
case
when um.usr_id is not null then 'Y'
else 'N'
end as "Applied to UM?"
from users u 
join institutes i on i.id = u.ins_id
left join sup_events_pp um on um.usr_id = u.id
left join proposals p on p.usr_id = u.id
left join participants par on par.usr_id = u.id
where p.usr_id is null and par.usr_id is null;

Schema.proposals:
CREATE TABLE PROPOSALS
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	TITLE VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USER_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	RESEARCH_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	EU_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- EU_support: Y = Yes, N = No
	PHYSICS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- physics: Y = Yes, N = No
	CHEMISTRY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- chemistry: Y = Yes, N = No
	MEDICAL VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- medical: Y = Yes, N = No
	LIFE_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- life_sciences: Y = Yes, N = No
	TECH_INSTRUMENTATION VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- tech_instrumentation: Y = Yes, N = No
	OTHER VARCHAR2(50), 
	SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	PROPOSAL_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- proposal_category: C = Continuation, R = Resubmission, N = New
	APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), -- application_category: N =  Normal,  U = Urgent, L = Long Term
	ENERGY VARCHAR2(255), 
	RESOLUTION VARCHAR2(80), 
	OTHER_REQUIREMENTS VARCHAR2(255), 
	SAMPLE_TREATMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	AVAILABLE_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	ADDITIONAL_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(255), 
	OFFLINE_FACILITIES VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	LOCAL_CONTACT_ID NUMBER, 
	SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	PROP_SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	PREVIOUS_PROPCODE VARCHAR2(32), 
	EU_SUPPORTED VARCHAR2(1), 
	REALSHIFTS NUMBER, 
	DESCRIPTION CLOB, 
	CONTACT_NAME VARCHAR2(90), 
	EARTH_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1), 
	MATERIALS_SCIENCE VARCHAR2(1), 
	PHYSICAL_CHEM VARCHAR2(1), 
	INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION VARCHAR2(1), 
	INS_ID NUMBER, 
	CMT_ID VARCHAR2(30), 
	RESEARCH_AREA VARCHAR2(3), 
	ICTP_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1), 
	USR_LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	REQUIRED_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	FEASIBILITY VARCHAR2(1), -- feasibility: Y = Viable, N = Unfeasible, U = Conflicting, R = Feasible on required beamline, A = Feasible on alternative beamline
	REQ_ALT_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	BML_LOGICAL_OPERATOR VARCHAR2(3), 
	REQ_ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	REQ_APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ALLOCATION_MAIL VARCHAR2(1) DEFAULT null, 
	DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(2), 
	SUB_DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(8), 
	ACHIEVEMENTS CLOB, 
	SEMESTER NUMBER, 
	EU_SUPPORT_CRUCIAL VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULING VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULE_COUNTER NUMBER, 
	LONGTERM_COMMENTS VARCHAR2(220), 
	EMAIL_ACHIEV_EXPREP DATE, 
	EU_REFUNDABLE_DAYS NUMBER, 
	MONTHLY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ICTP_SUPPORTED NUMBER, 
	FACILITY VARCHAR2(1), 
	POLARIZATION VARCHAR2(4), 
	TUNABILITY NUMBER, 
	SAMPLE_TEMPERATURE NUMBER, 
	LAST_MINUTE VARCHAR2(1), 
	BIOSTRUCTX_CODE VARCHAR2(10), 
	IAEA VARCHAR2(1), 
	WAYFORLIGHTS VARCHAR2(1), 
	FERMI_MODE NUMBER, 
	ASSIGNMENT_MAIL VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_FUNDED VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_REQUEST VARCHAR2(20), 
	CULTURAL_HERITAGE VARCHAR2(1), 
	LAST_CHANGE DATE, 
	FUND_SOURCE NUMBER(4,0), 
	NOTES CLOB, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_TECH__000 CHECK (TECH_INSTRUMENTATION IN ('Y', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_RESEA_000 CHECK (RESEARCH_CATEGORY IN ('P','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PROPO_000 CHECK (PROPOSAL_CATEGORY IN ('C', 'R', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHYSI_000 CHECK (PHYSICS IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHCHE_000 CHECK (PHYSICAL_CHEM IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MEDIC_000 CHECK (MEDICAL IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MATER_000 CHECK (MATERIALS_SCIENCE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_LIFE__000 CHECK (LIFE_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_INDUS_000 CHECK (INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EU_SU_000 CHECK (EU_SUPPORT IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_ELECT_000 CHECK (ELECTRON_BEAM IN ('S','M','F')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EARTH_000 CHECK (EARTH_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_CHEMI_000 CHECK (CHEMISTRY IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_APPLI_000 CHECK (APPLICATION_CATEGORY IN ('N','U','L')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_FACILITY FOREIGN KEY (FACILITY)
	  REFERENCES FACILITIES (CODE) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (REQUIRED_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK2 FOREIGN KEY (REQ_ALT_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_INSTITUTES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_BML_FK FOREIGN KEY (BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_CONCTACT_IS_FK FOREIGN KEY (LOCAL_CONTACT_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.STATUS IS 'Label = Status, List= Select code, name from proposals_stataus'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY prio'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.SUB_DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Sub Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM sub_competence'

NL Query: How many visitors came to SESAME during each year?
SQL Query:
Select distinct extract(year from date_of_arrival) as "Year",
count(id) as "No. of Visits"
from visitors
group by extract(year from date_of_arrival)
order by extract(year from date_of_arrival);

	EMAIL VARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	DATE_OF_ARRIVAL DATE NOT NULL ENABLE,

	DATE_OF_DEPARTURE DATE,

	USER_ID NUMBER(5,0) DEFAULT 1001 NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CHECKEDIN VARCHAR2(100), 
	BARCODE NUMBER(5,0) DEFAULT NULL NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT VISITORS_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);

NL Query: How many visits were recorded each month during 2017
SQL Query:
Select distinct extract(month from date_of_arrival) as "Month",
count(id) as "No. of Visits"
from visitors
where extract(year from date_of_arrival) = 2017
group by extract(month from date_of_arrival)
order by extract(month from date_of_arrival);

	NOTES_COMMENTS VARCHAR2(2000), 
	TIME_OF_DEPARTURE VARCHAR2(100), 
	USER_ID NUMBER(5,0) DEFAULT 1001 NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CHECKEDIN VARCHAR2(100), 
	BARCODE NUMBER(5,0) DEFAULT NULL NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT VISITORS_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);

NL Query: Which semesters had more than 200 total avaliable beamtimes distributed to the BEATS beamline? Only show the number of the semester and the total available beamtime
SQL Query:
SELECT bt.semester as "Semester",
bt.total_avail as "Total Available Beam Time"
FROM bt_distribution bt 
WHERE bt.total_avail > 200
and bt.bml_short_name='BEATS';

Schema.bt_distribution:

   (	SEMESTER NUMBER,

NL Query: What substances used mentioned the proposals' safety files could possibly (or definitely) have a risk of explosion and what is the mass and formula of said substance(s)? Also only include the id of the proposal and the hosting beamline.
SQL Query:
Select si.prop_id as "Proposal",
si.substance as "Substance",
si.mass as "Mass",
si.formula as "Formula",
nvl(p.bml_name, required_bml_name) as "Beamline"
from safety_infos si
join proposals p on p.id = si.prop_id
where si.risk in ('U','Y')
and si.explosive = 'Y';

Schema.safety_infos:
CREATE TABLE SAFETY_INFOS 
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	SUBSTANCE VARCHAR2(160) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	FORMULA VARCHAR2(80) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- category: G = Gas, L = Liquid, M = Multilayer, S = Single Crystal, O = Other, B = Biocrystallography, P = Powder, s = Solid
	OTHER_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(30), 
	SAFI_SIZE NUMBER, 
	MASS NUMBER, 
	SURFACE_AREA NUMBER, 
	SPACE_GROUP VARCHAR2(30), 
	CELL_DIMENSIONS VARCHAR2(80), 
	CONTAINER VARCHAR2(60), 
	RISK VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- risk: Y = Yes, N = No, U = Unknown
	RADIOACTIVE VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- radioactive: Y = Yes, N = No
	CORROSIVE VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- corrosive: Y = Yes, N = No
	CONTAMINANT VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- contaminant: Y = Yes, N = No
	BIO_HAZARD VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- bio_hazard: Y = Yes, N = No
	TOXIC VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- toxic: Y = Yes, N = No
	OXIDISING VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- oxidising: Y = Yes, N = No
	COMBUSTIVE VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- combustive: Y = Yes, N = No
	CARCINOGENE VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- carcinogene: Y = Yes, N = No
	INFLAMMABLE VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- inflammable: Y = Yes, N = No
	EXPLOSIVE VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- explosive: Y = Yes, N = No
	EXHAUST_DISPOSAL VARCHAR2(255), 
	SAMPLE_DISPOSAL VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- sample_disposal: R = Removed by user
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE,  -- status: A = Certified , N = Not certified
	PROP_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	SAFETY_STATUS VARCHAR2(1), -- safety_status: N = Not checked, Y = Passed without prescription, W = Warning, P = Passed with prescription
	SAFETY_COMMENT VARCHAR2(255), 
	VOLUME NUMBER, 
	PRESSURE NUMBER, 
	UNATENDED VARCHAR2(10), 
	SUPPLIER VARCHAR2(40), 
	CAS VARCHAR2(15), 
	SAFETY_RECEIVED VARCHAR2(1) DEFAULT 'N', 
	USAGE_ID NUMBER, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_TOXIC_000 CHECK (TOXIC IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_STATU_000 CHECK (STATUS IN ('A','N')) ENABLE,
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_SAMPL_000 CHECK (SAMPLE_DISPOSAL IN ('R','S','D')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_RISK_000 CHECK (RISK IN ('Y','N','U')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_RADIO_000 CHECK (RADIOACTIVE IN ('Y', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_OXIDI_000 CHECK (OXIDISING IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_INFLA_000 CHECK (INFLAMMABLE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_EXPLO_000 CHECK (EXPLOSIVE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_CORRO_000 CHECK (CORROSIVE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_CONTA_000 CHECK (CONTAMINANT='Y' OR CONTAMINANT='N') ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_COMBU_000 CHECK (COMBUSTIVE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_CATEG_000 CHECK (CATEGORY IN ('G','L','M','S','O','B','P','s')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_CARCI_000 CHECK (CARCINOGENE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_BIO_H_000 CHECK (BIO_HAZARD IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT SAFI_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT SAFI_PROP_FK FOREIGN KEY (PROP_ID)
	  REFERENCES PROPOSALS (ID) ENABLE
);

COMMENT ON COLUMN SAFETY_INFOS.CATEGORY IS 'Label=Physical state ,DefList= Other,Powder,Liquid,Single Crystal,Multilayer,Biocrystallography,Gas,Solid ,ValList= O,P,L,S,M,B,G,s'
COMMENT ON COLUMN SAFETY_INFOS.RISK IS 'Label=Risk in sample, preparation or equipment , DefList=Yes,No,Unknown, ValList=Y,N,U'

NL Query: Has any of the proposals sent for IR claimed that their sample substance's surface area? Show me the name of the proposer and the title of the proposal and what substance they have and what is its formula, mass and surface area.
SQL Query:
Select p.id as "Proposal",
u.name ||' '||u.lastname as "Proposer",
si.substance as "Substance",
si.mass as "Mass",
si.formula as "Formula",
si.surface_area as "Surface Area"
from proposals p
join safety_infos si on p.id = si.prop_id
join users u on u.id = p.usr_id
where (p.bml_name = 'IR' or required_bml_name = 'IR')
and si.surface_area is not null;

);

   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.RESEARCHER_TYPE IS 'Label=Researcher type,deflist=Research Fellow,Academic Staff,Post Doctoral Researcher,Doctoral Research Student,Master Research Student,Undergraduate Student,Technician,SESAME Staff,vallist=REF,ACS,PDOC,DOCR,MRS,UND,TECH,SES'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NEW_USER IS 'Label=New user'

   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH_CNT_ID IS 'Label=Birth country,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_ADDR IS 'Label=Home address'

NL Query: Can you give me a list with the name, country and the city of each institute labelled as (other) as its type?

cnt_name as "Country",
city as "City"
from institutes

NL Query: How many UM application, for the latest UM, were connected to industry collaborations and how many are related to cultural heritage and what is the total number of applications?
SQL Query:
Select count(case when industry_collaboration = 'Y' then id end) as "No. of Industry",
count(case when cultural_heritage = 'Y' then id end) as "No. of Cultural Heritage",
count(id) as "Total Applications"
from sup_events_pp;

NL Query: Which 3 countries (as in country of the institute of the user) had the highest number of users' meeting applicants in 16th users' meeting.
SQL Query:
Select * from
(Select i.cnt_name as "Country",
count(um16.id) as "No. of Applications"
from sup_events_pp_16um um16
join institutes i on i.id = um16.ins_id
group by i.cnt_name
order by count(um16.id) desc) where rownum <= 3;

NL Query: Which committee has the highest number of rejected proposals of all time?
SQL Query:
Select * from
(Select nvl(cmt_id, research_area) as "Committee",
count(case when status = 'N' then id end) as "Rejected Proposals"
from proposals
group by nvl(cmt_id, research_area) 
order by count(case when status = 'N' then id end) desc
) where rownum = 1;

NL Query: Who are the users who do not authorize their name and their institute's name to be included in the annual report in all cases (regardless of whether they have/have not participated in any way with the facility), list their names, nationality, emails, institute and institute's country.
SQL Query:
Select u.id as "User ID",
u.name ||' '||u.lastname as "User",
u.email as "E-mail",
c.name as "Nationality",
i.name as "Institute",
i.cnt_name as "Country"
from users u 
join institutes i on i.id = u.ins_id
join countries c on c.code = u.nationality
join sup_personal_data_form_t pt on pt.usr_id = u.id
where pt.case1a = 'N'
and pt.case2a = 'N'
and pt.case2b = 'N'
and pt.case4a = 'N'
and pt.case3a = 'N'
and pt.case3b = 'N'
and pt.case5a = 'N'
and pt.case5b = 'N'
and pt.case6a = 'N'
and pt.case6b = 'N'
and pt.case7a = 'N'
and pt.case8a = 'N'
and pt.case8b = 'N';

Schema.sup_personal_data_form_t:
CREATE TABLE SUP_PERSONAL_DATA_FORM_T -- Description: Consent/Authorize name and institution to appear in the Annual Scientific Report for Member Countries.
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER, 
	REG_DATE DATE, 
	CASE1A VARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CASE2A VARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CASE2B VARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CASE3A VARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CASE3B VARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CASE4A VARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CASE5A VARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CASE5B VARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CASE6A VARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CASE6B VARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CASE7A VARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- Case7: User never participated in experiments or beamtimes but attended at least 1 users' meeting
	CASE7B VARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CASE8A VARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- Case8: User never participated in experiments, beamtimes or any users' meetings
	CASE8B VARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	AUD_CHANGER NUMBER DEFAULT -1 NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT SUP_PERSONAL_DATA_FORM_T_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
Schema.countries:
CREATE TABLE COUNTRIES 
   (	NAME VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CODE VARCHAR2(4) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	EU VARCHAR2(1), 
	IBAN_LEN NUMBER, 
	CONT_CODE VARCHAR2(2), 
	ACCOUNT_POSITION NUMBER, 
	ACCOUNT_LENGTH NUMBER, 
	CERIC VARCHAR2(1), 
	 CONSTRAINT CNT_PK PRIMARY KEY (CODE, NAME)
);
   COMMENT ON COLUMN COUNTRIES.NAME IS 'Label=Country'
Schema.users:
CREATE TABLE USERS
   (	ID NUMBER, 
	NAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	EMAIL VARCHAR2(255), 
	URL VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1), 
	PASSWORD VARCHAR2(20), 
	MAILING VARCHAR2(1), -- mailing: Y = Yes, N = Not Included
	INS_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	PRIVACY VARCHAR2(1), 
	GENDER VARCHAR2(2), 
	NATIONALITY VARCHAR2(4), 
	BIRTH DATE, 
	COMP_1 VARCHAR2(2), 
	COMP_2 VARCHAR2(2), 
	RESEARCHER_TYPE VARCHAR2(4), -- researcher_type: Research Fellow = REF, Academic Staff = ACS, Post Doctoral Researcher = PDOC, Doctoral Research Student = DOCR, Master Research Student = MRS, Undergraduate Student = UND, Technician = TECH, SESAME Staff = SES
	NEW_USER VARCHAR2(2), 
	BIRTH_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	BIRTH_CNT_ID VARCHAR2(4), 
	HOME_ADDR VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_CNT_ID VARCHAR2(4), 
	HOME_ZIP VARCHAR2(10), 
	SAFETY_VIDEO DATE, 
	COD_FISCALE VARCHAR2(16), 
	BIRTH_PROVINCE VARCHAR2(2), 
	BIRTH_TOWN VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_PROVINCE VARCHAR2(2), 
	HOME_TOWN VARCHAR2(50), 
	IDSUBJECT VARCHAR2(16), 
	CREATION_DATE DATE, 
	LAST_ACCESS DATE, 
	EAAHASH VARCHAR2(40), 
	AUDIT_CHANGER NUMBER, 
	AUDIT_ADM_CHANGER NUMBER, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_USERS_STATU_000 CHECK (STATUS IN ('A', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT USR_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT USR_INS_FK FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)

NL Query: Which new proposals meant for the XAFS or MS/XPD beamlines are long term proposals? List the proposal's owner, title, beamline, feasibility and current status.
SQL Query:
Select p.id as "Proposal",
u.name ||' '||u.lastname as "Proposer",
p.title as "Title", 
nvl(p.bml_name, required_bml_name) as "Beamline",
DECODE(p.FEASIBILITY,NULL,'---','Y','Viable','N','Unfeasible','U','Conflicting', 'R','Feasible on required beamline','A','Feasible on alternative beamline') AS "Feasibility",
ps.name as "Status"
from proposals p
join users u on u.id = p.usr_id
join proposals_status ps on ps.code = p.status
where (nvl(p.bml_name, required_bml_name) = 'XAFS/XRF'
or nvl(p.bml_name, required_bml_name) = 'MS/XPD')
and p.semester = (select max(p1.semester) from proposals p1)
and p.application_category = 'L';

NL Query: Has anyone applied a request to access the IR beamline's lab for longer than 3 days? What was their time of arrival and departure and what was the name of the proposal's owner and its title as well as which semester was it,? Show both proposal and access ids and the number of days as well.
SQL Query:
Select a.access_id as "Access ID",
p.id as "Proposal ID",
u.name ||' '||u.lastname as "Proposer",
p.title as "Title",
(a.departure - a.arrival) as "Days",
a.arrival as "Date of Arrival",
a.departure as "Date of Departure",
p.semester as "Semester"
from accesses a 
join proposals p on p.id = a.prop_id
join users u on u.id = a.usr_id
where (a.departure - a.arrival) > 3;

NL Query: Compare the number of proposals which had requested funding support to the ones which didn't in each semester and show the total number of proposals as well.
SQL Query:
Select semester as "Semester",
count(case when fund_source is not null then id end) as "Proposals with Fund",
count(case when fund_source is null then id end) as "Proposals w/o Fund",
count(id) as "All Proposals"
from proposals
group by semester;

NL Query: What are the countries which have at least 10 of their citizens as a registered user in the DB and how many users does each have
SQL Query:
Select c.name as "Country",
count(u.id) as "No. of Users"
from users u
join countries c on c.code = u.nationality
group by c.name
having count(u.id) >= 10;

NL Query: Which proposals evaluated by the AHS didn't pass the threshold during the 6th semester? Include the proposer, title score and status.
SQL Query:
Select p.id as "Proposal ID",
u.name ||' '||u.lastname as "Proposer",
p.title as "Title",
ev.final_score as "Score",
ps.name as "Status"
from proposals p
join users u on u.id = p.usr_id
join evaluations ev on ev.prop_id = p.id and ev.evlt_id = 3
join proposals_status ps on ps.code = p.status
join proposals_threshold pth on pth.sem = p.semester
where nvl(p.cmt_id, p.research_area) = 'AHS'
and p.semester = 6
and ev.final_score < pth.threshold;

NL Query: Which committees had more than 50 proposals evaluated/reviewed during the 4th semester?
SQL Query:
Select nvl(cmt_id, research_area) as "Committee",
count(id) as "No. of Proposals"
from proposals
where semester = 4
group by nvl(cmt_id, research_area)
having count(id) > 50;

NL Query: ما هي عناوين التجارب التي اجريت خلال الفصلين الماضيين في خط الاشعاع XAFS/XRF و التي فقدت أكثر من نصف الساعات المخصصة لها في ساعات التجهيز و الساعات الغير مستخدمة (setup and unused hours). ما مجموع الساعات التي لم يتم العمل خلالها مقارنة بعدد الساعات المخصصة للتجربة
SQL Query:
Select s.prop_id as "Proposal ID",
u.name ||' '|| u.lastname as "Proposer",
p.title as "Title",
(s.assigned_shifts * 8) as "Total Assigned Hours",
(s.setup_shifts + s.unusable_shifts) as "Total Hours Lost"
from summaries s
join users u on u.id = s.usr_id
join proposals p on p.id = s.prop_id
where (s.setup_shifts + s.unusable_shifts) > ((s.assigned_shifts * 8) / 2)
and s.bml_name = 'XAFS/XRF'
and p.semester = (select max(p1.semester)-2 from proposals p1);

   (	ID NUMBER,

	NATIONALITY VARCHAR2(4),

	NEW_USER VARCHAR2(2),

Schema.summaries:
CREATE TABLE SUMMARIES --Description: Shifts and hours summary completed experiments/proposals
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	SMR_BEGIN DATE NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	SMR_END DATE NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ASSIGNED_SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- assigned_shifts: Number of assigned shifts (conversion: 1 shift = 8 hours)
	SETUP_SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE,  -- setup_shifts: Total Setup Hours (not shifts)	(conversion: 8 hours = 1 shift)
	USABLE_SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- usable_shifts: Total Usable Hours (not shifts)	(conversion: 8 hours = 1 shift)
	UNUSABLE_SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- unusable_shifts: Total Unuasable Hours (not shifts) (conversion: 8 hours = 1 shift)
	PROP_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER, 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1), 
	BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	SDATE DATE, 
	EVENT_ID NUMBER, 
	 CONSTRAINT SMR_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_SUMMARIES_PROP_ID FOREIGN KEY (PROP_ID)
	  REFERENCES PROPOSALS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT FK_SUMMARIES_USR_ID FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);

NL Query: هل هنالك أي مقترحات يتم مراجعتها و تقييمها حاليا من قبل لجنة العلوم الحياتية و تم تعيينها على انها غير قابلة للتنفيذ أو قابلية تنفيذها متضاربة / غير واضحة؟ أدرج قائمة بعناوين هذه المقترحات بالإضافة إلى اسم خط الإشعاع و مقدم المقترح
SQL Query:
Select p.id as "Proposal ID",
u.name || ' ' || u.lastname as "Proposer",
p.title as "Title",
decode(p.feasibility, NULL,'---','N','Unfeasible','U','Conflicting') AS "Feasibility",
nvl(p.bml_name, p.required_bml_name) as "Beamline"
from proposals p 
join users u on u.id = p.usr_id
where nvl(p.cmt_id, p.research_area) = 'LS'
and p.feasibility in ('N', 'U')
and p.status = 'E';

NL Query: في خط البحث MS، هل كان هناك أي من التجارب التي تم تخصيص أكثر من 120 ساعة للعمل على التجربة و لم يكن هناك نهائيا أي ساعات غير مستخدمة؟ ما كان عنوان تلك المقترحات و  ما عدد الساعات المخصصة للتجربة و في اي فصل كانت؟
SQL Query:
Select s.prop_id as "Proposal ID",
u.name ||' '|| u.lastname as "Proposer",
p.title as "Title",
p.semester as "Semester",
(s.assigned_shifts * 8) as "Total Assigned Hours"
from summaries s
join users u on u.id = s.usr_id
join proposals p on p.id = s.prop_id
where s.unusable_shifts = 0
and (s.assigned_shifts*8) > 120
and s.bml_name = 'MS/XPD';

Schema.summaries:
CREATE TABLE SUMMARIES --Description: Shifts and hours summary completed experiments/proposals
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	SMR_BEGIN DATE NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	SMR_END DATE NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ASSIGNED_SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- assigned_shifts: Number of assigned shifts (conversion: 1 shift = 8 hours)
	SETUP_SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE,  -- setup_shifts: Total Setup Hours (not shifts)	(conversion: 8 hours = 1 shift)
	USABLE_SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- usable_shifts: Total Usable Hours (not shifts)	(conversion: 8 hours = 1 shift)
	UNUSABLE_SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- unusable_shifts: Total Unuasable Hours (not shifts) (conversion: 8 hours = 1 shift)
	PROP_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER, 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1), 
	BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	SDATE DATE, 
	EVENT_ID NUMBER, 
	 CONSTRAINT SMR_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_SUMMARIES_PROP_ID FOREIGN KEY (PROP_ID)
	  REFERENCES PROPOSALS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT FK_SUMMARIES_USR_ID FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);

NL Query: اعطني قائمة بعناوين المقترحات التي تم تسليمها هذا الفصل ولكن فقط ادرج العناين للمقترحات التي تحتوي على 4 مشاركين مع احتساب مقدم المقترح. بالاضافة الى االعنوان اعطني ايضا الاسم الكامل لمقدم المقترح و خط الاشعاع المستخدم.
SQL Query:
select p.id as "Proposal",
u.name || ' ' || u.lastname as "Proposer",
p.title as "Title",
nvl(p.bml_name, p.required_bml_name) as "Beamline"
from proposals p
left join (select part.usr_id, part.prop_id from participants part
union
select p1.usr_id, p1.id from proposals p1) ap on ap.prop_id = p.id 
join users u on p.usr_id = u.id 
where p.semester = (select max(p1.semester) from proposals p1)
group by p.id, u.name, u.lastname, p.title, nvl(p.bml_name, p.required_bml_name)
having count(ap.usr_id) = 4;

);

NL Query: ما هو اجمالي الساعات غير المستخدمة من جميع التجارب التي اجريت في خط الاشعة تحت الحمراء (IR) خلال أول فصلين على الإطلاق كل واحد وحده؟ بين رقم الفصل ايضا.
SQL Query:
Select p.semester as "Semester",
sum(s.unusable_shifts) as "Total Unused Hours"
from summaries s
join proposals p on p.id = s.prop_id
where s.bml_name = 'IR'
and p.semester between (select min(p1.semester) from proposals p1) and (select min(p1.semester)+ 1 from proposals p1)
group by p.semester;
