Schema.summaries:
CREATE TABLE SUMMARIES --Description: Shifts and hours summary completed experiments/proposals
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	SMR_BEGIN DATE NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	SMR_END DATE NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ASSIGNED_SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- assigned_shifts: Number of assigned shifts (conversion: 1 shift = 8 hours)
	SETUP_SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE,  -- setup_shifts: Total Setup Hours (not shifts)	(conversion: 8 hours = 1 shift)
	USABLE_SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- usable_shifts: Total Usable Hours (not shifts)	(conversion: 8 hours = 1 shift)
	UNUSABLE_SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- unusable_shifts: Total Unuasable Hours (not shifts) (conversion: 8 hours = 1 shift)
	PROP_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER, 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1), 
	BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	SDATE DATE, 
	EVENT_ID NUMBER, 
	 CONSTRAINT SMR_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_SUMMARIES_PROP_ID FOREIGN KEY (PROP_ID)
	  REFERENCES PROPOSALS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT FK_SUMMARIES_USR_ID FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);

NL Query: اعرض الحالة الحالية لجميع المقترحات المتعلقة بتعاون صناعي (Industry collaboration) والمرسلة في هذا الفصل، واذكر اسم مقدم المقترح والعنوان وخط الاشعاع ايضا.
SQL Query:
Select p.id as "Proposal",
u.name ||' '||u.lastname as "Proposer",
p.title as "Title",
nvl(p.bml_name, p.required_bml_name) as "Beamline",
ps.name as "Status"
from proposals p
join users u on u.id = p.usr_id
join proposals_status ps on ps.code = p.status
where p.industry_collaboration = 'Y'
and p.semester = (select max(p1.semester) from proposals p1);

Schema.users:

NL Query: ما هو الاسم الكامل لجميع طلاب البكالوريوس المسجلين في النظام كمستخدمين وما هي جنسياتهم؟
SQL Query:
Select u.id as "User ID",
u.name ||' '||u.lastname as "User",
c.name as "Nationality"
from users u 
join countries c on c.code = u.nationality
where u.researcher_type = 'UND';

NL Query: هل هناك اي طلاب ماستر تقدموا لحضور اجتماع المستخدمين الاخير؟ اذكر اسماءهم بالاضافة الى المعهد التابعين له وفي اي دولة يقع وهل هو جامعة ام معهد من نوع آخر؟ بيين كل الأنواع
SQL Query:
Select u.id as "User ID",
u.name ||' '||u.lastname as "User",
c.name as "Nationality",
i.name as "Institute",
i.cnt_name as "Institute Country",
val.description as "Institute Type"
from users u 
join countries c on c.code = u.nationality
join sup_events_pp um on um.usr_id = u.id
join institutes i on i.id = u.ins_id
join list_of_values val on val.code = i.ins_type and val.list = 'InstituteType'
where u.researcher_type = 'MRS';

	CODE VARCHAR2(4) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	EU VARCHAR2(1), 
	IBAN_LEN NUMBER, 
	CONT_CODE VARCHAR2(2), 
	ACCOUNT_POSITION NUMBER, 
	ACCOUNT_LENGTH NUMBER, 
	CERIC VARCHAR2(1), 
	 CONSTRAINT CNT_PK PRIMARY KEY (CODE, NAME)

Schema.institutes:
CREATE TABLE INSTITUTES 
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	NAME VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ADDRESS VARCHAR2(160) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CNT_NAME VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CITY VARCHAR2(40), 
	ZIP VARCHAR2(20) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	INS_TYPE VARCHAR2(3), 
	MODIF_USR_ID NUMBER, 
	MODIF_DATE DATE, 
	STATE_PROV VARCHAR2(40), 
	ITALIAN_PROV VARCHAR2(2), 
	ITALIAN_CITY VARCHAR2(40), 
	END_DATE DATE, 
	PEC VARCHAR2(60), 
	NOTES VARCHAR2(2000), 
	EMAIL VARCHAR2(60), 
	 CONSTRAINT INS_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.ID IS 'Sequence=SEQ_USERS_ID,Label=Institute'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.NAME IS 'Label=Institute name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.ADDRESS IS 'Label=Address'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.CNT_NAME IS 'Label=Country,List=SELECT NAME AS A FROM COUNTRIES'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.CITY IS 'Label=City'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.ZIP IS 'Label=Zip code'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.INS_TYPE IS 'Label=Institute Type, List=select code, description from list_of_values where list = ''InstituteType'''

NL Query: كم مقترحا تم جدولته من قبل كل لجنة تقييم خلال الفصل الماضي و ما متوسط علامات التقييم التي حصل عليها المقترحات عند كل لجنة؟
SQL Query:
Select nvl(p.cmt_id, p.research_area) as "Committee",
count(p.id) as "No. of Proposals",
trunc(avg(ev.final_score),2) as "Avg Score"
from proposals p
join evaluations ev on ev.prop_id = p.id and ev.evlt_id = 3
where p.semester = (select max(p1.semester)-1 from proposals p1)
and p.status = 'S'
group by nvl(p.cmt_id, p.research_area);

Schema.evaluations:
CREATE TABLE EVALUATIONS -- Description: Proposals evaluation
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	SCORE NUMBER(38,0), 
	COMMENTS CLOB, 
	PROP_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	EVLT_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	RELEVANCE NUMBER, 
	ORIGINALITY NUMBER, 
	LOWRISK NUMBER, 
	NEEDELETTRA NUMBER, 
	PREVRECORD NUMBER, 
	TECHNICAL_EVLT VARCHAR2(1), 
	BML_OR_CMT VARCHAR2(25), 
	REALSHIFTS NUMBER, 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1), 
	FINAL_SCORE NUMBER(4,2), 
	WEIGHTEDAVERAGE NUMBER(4,2), 
	COMPETENCE NUMBER(4,0), 
	QUARTER VARCHAR2(10), 
	APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	INTERNAL_COMMENTS CLOB, 
	REEDITING VARCHAR2(1), 
	REEDIT_COMMENTS CLOB, 
	 CONSTRAINT EVAL_UNIQUE UNIQUE (PROP_ID, USR_ID, EVLT_ID, BML_OR_CMT)
    
	 CONSTRAINT EVAL_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT EVAL_EVLT_FK FOREIGN KEY (EVLT_ID)
	  REFERENCES EVALUATION_TYPES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT EVAL_PROP_FK FOREIGN KEY (PROP_ID)
	  REFERENCES PROPOSALS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT EVAL_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);
Schema.proposals:
CREATE TABLE PROPOSALS
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	TITLE VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USER_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	RESEARCH_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	EU_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- EU_support: Y = Yes, N = No
	PHYSICS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- physics: Y = Yes, N = No
	CHEMISTRY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- chemistry: Y = Yes, N = No
	MEDICAL VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- medical: Y = Yes, N = No
	LIFE_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- life_sciences: Y = Yes, N = No
	TECH_INSTRUMENTATION VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- tech_instrumentation: Y = Yes, N = No
	OTHER VARCHAR2(50), 
	SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	PROPOSAL_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- proposal_category: C = Continuation, R = Resubmission, N = New
	APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), -- application_category: N =  Normal,  U = Urgent, L = Long Term
	ENERGY VARCHAR2(255), 
	RESOLUTION VARCHAR2(80), 
	OTHER_REQUIREMENTS VARCHAR2(255), 
	SAMPLE_TREATMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	AVAILABLE_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	ADDITIONAL_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(255), 
	OFFLINE_FACILITIES VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	LOCAL_CONTACT_ID NUMBER, 
	SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	PROP_SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	PREVIOUS_PROPCODE VARCHAR2(32), 
	EU_SUPPORTED VARCHAR2(1), 
	REALSHIFTS NUMBER, 
	DESCRIPTION CLOB, 
	CONTACT_NAME VARCHAR2(90), 
	EARTH_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1), 
	MATERIALS_SCIENCE VARCHAR2(1), 
	PHYSICAL_CHEM VARCHAR2(1), 
	INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION VARCHAR2(1), 
	INS_ID NUMBER, 
	CMT_ID VARCHAR2(30), 
	RESEARCH_AREA VARCHAR2(3), 
	ICTP_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1), 
	USR_LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	REQUIRED_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	FEASIBILITY VARCHAR2(1), -- feasibility: Y = Viable, N = Unfeasible, U = Conflicting, R = Feasible on required beamline, A = Feasible on alternative beamline
	REQ_ALT_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	BML_LOGICAL_OPERATOR VARCHAR2(3), 
	REQ_ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	REQ_APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ALLOCATION_MAIL VARCHAR2(1) DEFAULT null, 
	DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(2), 
	SUB_DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(8), 
	ACHIEVEMENTS CLOB, 
	SEMESTER NUMBER, 
	EU_SUPPORT_CRUCIAL VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULING VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULE_COUNTER NUMBER, 
	LONGTERM_COMMENTS VARCHAR2(220), 
	EMAIL_ACHIEV_EXPREP DATE, 
	EU_REFUNDABLE_DAYS NUMBER, 
	MONTHLY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ICTP_SUPPORTED NUMBER, 
	FACILITY VARCHAR2(1), 
	POLARIZATION VARCHAR2(4), 
	TUNABILITY NUMBER, 
	SAMPLE_TEMPERATURE NUMBER, 
	LAST_MINUTE VARCHAR2(1), 
	BIOSTRUCTX_CODE VARCHAR2(10), 
	IAEA VARCHAR2(1), 
	WAYFORLIGHTS VARCHAR2(1), 
	FERMI_MODE NUMBER, 
	ASSIGNMENT_MAIL VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_FUNDED VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_REQUEST VARCHAR2(20), 
	CULTURAL_HERITAGE VARCHAR2(1), 
	LAST_CHANGE DATE, 
	FUND_SOURCE NUMBER(4,0), 
	NOTES CLOB, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_TECH__000 CHECK (TECH_INSTRUMENTATION IN ('Y', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_RESEA_000 CHECK (RESEARCH_CATEGORY IN ('P','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PROPO_000 CHECK (PROPOSAL_CATEGORY IN ('C', 'R', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHYSI_000 CHECK (PHYSICS IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHCHE_000 CHECK (PHYSICAL_CHEM IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MEDIC_000 CHECK (MEDICAL IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MATER_000 CHECK (MATERIALS_SCIENCE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_LIFE__000 CHECK (LIFE_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_INDUS_000 CHECK (INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EU_SU_000 CHECK (EU_SUPPORT IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_ELECT_000 CHECK (ELECTRON_BEAM IN ('S','M','F')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EARTH_000 CHECK (EARTH_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_CHEMI_000 CHECK (CHEMISTRY IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_APPLI_000 CHECK (APPLICATION_CATEGORY IN ('N','U','L')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_FACILITY FOREIGN KEY (FACILITY)
	  REFERENCES FACILITIES (CODE) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (REQUIRED_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK2 FOREIGN KEY (REQ_ALT_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_INSTITUTES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_BML_FK FOREIGN KEY (BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_CONCTACT_IS_FK FOREIGN KEY (LOCAL_CONTACT_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.STATUS IS 'Label = Status, List= Select code, name from proposals_stataus'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY prio'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.SUB_DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Sub Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM sub_competence'

NL Query: حدد عدد المقترحات تحت كل مجال من مجالات البحث من بين جميع المقترحات المرفوضة أو الملغية من قبل المستخدم خلال الفصل الماضي
SQL Query:
Select comp.description as "Discipline",
count(p.id) as "No. of Proposals"
from proposals p
join competence comp on comp.code = p.discipline 
where p.semester = (select max(p1.semester)-1 from proposals p1)
and p.status in ('N', 'c')
group by comp.description;

NL Query: حضر تقريرا بأسماء المستخدمين الذين قدموا طلبا لاستخدام أحد المختبرات خلال الفترة ما بين شهر 3 و 5 من عام 2024 أو بين شهر 10 و 12 من عام 2023. بين في التقرير حالة الطلب إن كان تم النظر فيه و قبوله أم لا و تاريخ الوصول و اسم خط الإشاع الذي يقدمون إليه و id المقترح و id طلب الاستخدام بالإضافة إلى اسم مقدم الطلب.
SQL Query:
Select a.access_id as "Access ID",
a.prop_id as "Proposal ID",
u.name ||' '|| u.lastname as "User",
a.arrival as "Date of Arrival",
a.bml_name as "Beamline",
val.description as "Status"
from accesses a 
join users u on u.id = a.usr_id
join list_of_values val on val.code = a.status and val.list = 'AccessStatus'
where a.arrival between TO_DATE('01/03/24', 'DD/MM/YY') and TO_DATE('31/05/24', 'DD/MM/YY')
or a.arrival between TO_DATE('01/10/23', 'DD/MM/YY') and TO_DATE('31/12/23', 'DD/MM/YY')
order by a.arrival;

Schema.users:
CREATE TABLE USERS
   (	ID NUMBER, 
	NAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	EMAIL VARCHAR2(255), 
	URL VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1), 
	PASSWORD VARCHAR2(20), 
	MAILING VARCHAR2(1), -- mailing: Y = Yes, N = Not Included
	INS_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	PRIVACY VARCHAR2(1), 
	GENDER VARCHAR2(2), 
	NATIONALITY VARCHAR2(4), 
	BIRTH DATE, 
	COMP_1 VARCHAR2(2), 
	COMP_2 VARCHAR2(2), 
	RESEARCHER_TYPE VARCHAR2(4), -- researcher_type: Research Fellow = REF, Academic Staff = ACS, Post Doctoral Researcher = PDOC, Doctoral Research Student = DOCR, Master Research Student = MRS, Undergraduate Student = UND, Technician = TECH, SESAME Staff = SES
	NEW_USER VARCHAR2(2), 
	BIRTH_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	BIRTH_CNT_ID VARCHAR2(4), 
	HOME_ADDR VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_CNT_ID VARCHAR2(4), 
	HOME_ZIP VARCHAR2(10), 
	SAFETY_VIDEO DATE, 
	COD_FISCALE VARCHAR2(16), 
	BIRTH_PROVINCE VARCHAR2(2), 
	BIRTH_TOWN VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_PROVINCE VARCHAR2(2), 
	HOME_TOWN VARCHAR2(50), 
	IDSUBJECT VARCHAR2(16), 
	CREATION_DATE DATE, 
	LAST_ACCESS DATE, 
	EAAHASH VARCHAR2(40), 
	AUDIT_CHANGER NUMBER, 
	AUDIT_ADM_CHANGER NUMBER, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_USERS_STATU_000 CHECK (STATUS IN ('A', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT USR_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT USR_INS_FK FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE
);
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.ID IS 'Sequence=SEQ_USERS_ID,Label=User ID'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NAME IS 'Label=Name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.LASTNAME IS 'Label=Lastname'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.EMAIL IS 'Label=E-mail'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.URL IS 'Label=WWW Home Page'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.STATUS IS 'Label=Validation'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.PASSWORD IS 'Label=Password'

NL Query: هل يمكنك ايجاد الاسم الكامل، المعهد و نوع المعهد، ودولة الاصل (لكل من المستخدم والمعهد) بالاضافة الى الايميل ونوع الباحث لكل مستخدم شارك سواء كمقدم او كجزء من فريق مقترح او تجربة او حضر اجتماع المستخدمين السابع عشر، وتصنيفهم حسب ما اذا شاركوا فقط في التجارب/المقترحات (تحت تسمية "Proposal") او فقط بحضور اجتماع المستخدمين السابع عشر (تحت تسمية "User Meeting 17") او كليهما (تحت تسمية "Both")؟
SQL Query:
Select distinct u.id as "User ID",
u.name ||' '|| u.lastname as "User",
c.name as "Nationality",
i.name as "Institute",
i.cnt_name as "Institute Country",
u.email as "E-mail",
decode(u.researcher_type,'REF', 'Research Fellow', 'ACS', 'Academic Staff', 'PDOC', 'Post Doctoral Researcher', 'DOCR', 'Doctoral Research Student', 'MRS', 'Master Research Student', 'UND', 'Undergraduate Student', 'TECH', 'Technician', 'SES', 'SESAME Staff') as "Researcher Type",
case 
when (p.usr_id is not null or par.usr_id is not null)and um17.usr_id is null
then 'Proposal'
when (p.usr_id is null and par.usr_id is null)and um17.usr_id is not null
then 'User Meeting 17' 
when (p.usr_id is not null or par.usr_id is not null) and um17.usr_id is not null
then 'Both'
end as "Type of Participation"
from users u
join institutes i on i.id = u.ins_id
join countries c on c.code = u.nationality
left join proposals p on p.usr_id = u.id
left join participants par on par.usr_id = u.id
left join sup_events_pp_17th_um um17 on um17.usr_id = u.id
where p.usr_id is not null 
or par.usr_id is not null 
or um17.usr_id is not null;

	EARTH_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1), 
	MATERIALS_SCIENCE VARCHAR2(1),

	ICTP_SUPPORTED NUMBER, 
	FACILITY VARCHAR2(1), 
	POLARIZATION VARCHAR2(4),

	SAMPLE_TEMPERATURE NUMBER, 
	LAST_MINUTE VARCHAR2(1), 
	BIOSTRUCTX_CODE VARCHAR2(10), 
	IAEA VARCHAR2(1), 
	WAYFORLIGHTS VARCHAR2(1),

	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_TECH__000 CHECK (TECH_INSTRUMENTATION IN ('Y', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_RESEA_000 CHECK (RESEARCH_CATEGORY IN ('P','N')) ENABLE,

	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHYSI_000 CHECK (PHYSICS IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHCHE_000 CHECK (PHYSICAL_CHEM IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MEDIC_000 CHECK (MEDICAL IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MATER_000 CHECK (MATERIALS_SCIENCE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_LIFE__000 CHECK (LIFE_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_INDUS_000 CHECK (INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EU_SU_000 CHECK (EU_SUPPORT IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_ELECT_000 CHECK (ELECTRON_BEAM IN ('S','M','F')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EARTH_000 CHECK (EARTH_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_CHEMI_000 CHECK (CHEMISTRY IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_APPLI_000 CHECK (APPLICATION_CATEGORY IN ('N','U','L')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_FACILITY FOREIGN KEY (FACILITY)
	  REFERENCES FACILITIES (CODE) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (REQUIRED_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK2 FOREIGN KEY (REQ_ALT_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_INSTITUTES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_BML_FK FOREIGN KEY (BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_CONCTACT_IS_FK FOREIGN KEY (LOCAL_CONTACT_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.STATUS IS 'Label = Status, List= Select code, name from proposals_stataus'

	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.SUB_DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Sub Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM sub_competence'

NL Query: بخصوص المنشورات التي تحتوي على نتائج من التجارب التي أجريت عن طريق المقترحات، انشئ قائمة بعناوين المنشورات الناتجة فقط من مقترحات الفصلين الثالث و الرابع في خط الاشعاع XAFS و اظهر في أي سنة تم تقديم المقترح و في اي سنة صدر المنشور.
SQL Query:
Select pub.pbl_id as "Publication ID",
pub.title as "Publication Title",
pub.year as "Year of Publication",
extract(year from p.submission_date) as "Year of Proposal Submission",
p.semester as "Proposal Semester"
from publi pub 
join publi_items item on pub.pbl_id = item.pbl_id and item.item_type = 'PRP'
join proposals p on p.id = to_number(item.code)
where p.semester in (3,4)
and nvl(p.bml_name, p.required_bml_name) = 'XAFS/XRF';

   (	PBL_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE,

	 CONSTRAINT PUBLI_ITEMS_PK PRIMARY KEY (PBL_ID, CODE)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_PUBLI_ITEMS_PUBLI_PBL_ID FOREIGN KEY (PBL_ID)
	  REFERENCES PUBLI (PBL_ID) ON DELETE CASCADE ENABLE
);

NL Query: اعطني تقريرا عن جميع المقترحات الجديدة التي هي اما اعادة ارسال (resubmission) او استكمال لمقترحات سابقة (continuation)، ادرج اسم مقدم المقترح الجديد وعنوانه. ادرج ايضا خط الاشعاع والحالة لكل من المقترح الحالي والسابق بالاضافة الى فصل المقترح السابق فقط، ووضح ما اذا كان المقترح الجديد استكمالا (resubmission) ام اعادة ارسال (continuation).
SQL Query:
Select p.id as "Proposal ID",
u.name ||' '|| u.lastname as "Proposer",
p.title as "Title",
decode(p.proposal_category, 'C', 'Continuation', 'R', 'Resubmission') as "Category",
nvl(p.bml_name, p.required_bml_name) as "Current Beamline",
nvl(pr.bml_name, pr.required_bml_name) as "Previous Beamline",
(select name from proposals_status where code=p.status) as "Current Status",
(select name from proposals_status where code=pr.status) AS "Previous Status",
pr.semester as "Previous Semester"
from proposals p
join proposals pr on pr.id = p.previous_propcode and p.proposal_category in ('C', 'R')
join users u on u.id = p.usr_id
where p.semester = (select max(p1.semester) from proposals p1);

Schema.users:
CREATE TABLE USERS
   (	ID NUMBER, 
	NAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	EMAIL VARCHAR2(255), 
	URL VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1), 
	PASSWORD VARCHAR2(20), 
	MAILING VARCHAR2(1), -- mailing: Y = Yes, N = Not Included
	INS_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	PRIVACY VARCHAR2(1), 
	GENDER VARCHAR2(2), 
	NATIONALITY VARCHAR2(4), 
	BIRTH DATE, 
	COMP_1 VARCHAR2(2), 
	COMP_2 VARCHAR2(2), 
	RESEARCHER_TYPE VARCHAR2(4), -- researcher_type: Research Fellow = REF, Academic Staff = ACS, Post Doctoral Researcher = PDOC, Doctoral Research Student = DOCR, Master Research Student = MRS, Undergraduate Student = UND, Technician = TECH, SESAME Staff = SES
	NEW_USER VARCHAR2(2), 
	BIRTH_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	BIRTH_CNT_ID VARCHAR2(4), 
	HOME_ADDR VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_CNT_ID VARCHAR2(4), 
	HOME_ZIP VARCHAR2(10), 
	SAFETY_VIDEO DATE, 
	COD_FISCALE VARCHAR2(16), 
	BIRTH_PROVINCE VARCHAR2(2), 
	BIRTH_TOWN VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_PROVINCE VARCHAR2(2), 
	HOME_TOWN VARCHAR2(50), 
	IDSUBJECT VARCHAR2(16), 
	CREATION_DATE DATE, 
	LAST_ACCESS DATE, 
	EAAHASH VARCHAR2(40), 
	AUDIT_CHANGER NUMBER, 
	AUDIT_ADM_CHANGER NUMBER, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_USERS_STATU_000 CHECK (STATUS IN ('A', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT USR_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT USR_INS_FK FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE
);
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.ID IS 'Sequence=SEQ_USERS_ID,Label=User ID'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NAME IS 'Label=Name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.LASTNAME IS 'Label=Lastname'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.EMAIL IS 'Label=E-mail'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.URL IS 'Label=WWW Home Page'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.STATUS IS 'Label=Validation'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.PASSWORD IS 'Label=Password'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.MAILING IS 'Label=Included in mailing lists'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.INS_ID IS 'Label=Institute'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.GENDER IS 'Label=Gender,vallist=,M,F'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NATIONALITY IS 'Label=Present nationality,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH IS 'Label=Birth date '
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.COMP_1 IS 'Label=Competence 1,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY description'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.COMP_2 IS 'Label=Competence 2 List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY description'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.RESEARCHER_TYPE IS 'Label=Researcher type,deflist=Research Fellow,Academic Staff,Post Doctoral Researcher,Doctoral Research Student,Master Research Student,Undergraduate Student,Technician,SESAME Staff,vallist=REF,ACS,PDOC,DOCR,MRS,UND,TECH,SES'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NEW_USER IS 'Label=New user'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH_CITY IS 'Label=Birth place'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH_CNT_ID IS 'Label=Birth country,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_ADDR IS 'Label=Home address'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_CITY IS 'Label=City'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_CNT_ID IS 'Label=Country,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_ZIP IS 'Label=ZIP code'

NL Query: اعرض الحالة الحالية لجميع مقترحات التعاون الصناعي التي ارسلت خلال الفصل ال 7 واذكر عنوانها فقط.
SQL Query:
Select p.id as "Proposal ID",
p.title as "Title",
ps.name as "Status"
from proposals p
join proposals_status ps on ps.code = p.status
where p.semester = 7
and p.industry_collaboration = 'Y';

	 CONSTRAINT PROP_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_FACILITY FOREIGN KEY (FACILITY)
	  REFERENCES FACILITIES (CODE) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (REQUIRED_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK2 FOREIGN KEY (REQ_ALT_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_INSTITUTES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_BML_FK FOREIGN KEY (BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_CONCTACT_IS_FK FOREIGN KEY (LOCAL_CONTACT_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);

	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY prio'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.SUB_DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Sub Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM sub_competence'

NL Query: قارن عدد المقترحات المجدولة بعدد اجمالي المقترحات لكل دولة (حيث الدولة هي دولة المعهد وليس جنسية المستخدمين) في جميع الفصول.
SQL Query:
Select i.cnt_name as "Country",
count(case when p.status = 'S' then p.id end) as "Scheduled Proposals",
count(p.id) as "All Proposals"
from proposals p
join institutes i on i.id = p.ins_id
group by i.cnt_name;

Schema.proposals:
CREATE TABLE PROPOSALS
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	TITLE VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USER_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	RESEARCH_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	EU_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- EU_support: Y = Yes, N = No

	SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE,

	PROPOSAL_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- proposal_category: C = Continuation, R = Resubmission, N = New

	RESOLUTION VARCHAR2(80),

NL Query: هل هناك اي منشورات (تم اعتمادها/نشرها) كمنشور مجلة او مؤتمر او رسالة علمية لا تملك رابط DOI؟ اذا وجد، يرجى ذكر عنوانها وسنة النشر لكل منها.
SQL Query:
Select pbl_id as "Publication ID",
title as "Title",
year as "Year"
from publi 
where doi is null
and status = 'Y';

NL Query: ما هي اسماء اول 15 مستخدما سجلوا في النظام ومتى انشأوا حساباتهم؟ اعرض ايضا المعهد التابعين له وموقعه وما هو منصبهم / نوع الباحث (طلاب، باحثو ما بعد الدكتوراه، زملاء بحث.. إلخ)؟
SQL Query:
Select * from
(Select u.id as "User ID",
u.name || ' ' ||u.lastname as "User",
i.name as "Institute",
i.cnt_name as "Country", u.creation_date as "Creation Date",
decode(u.researcher_type,'REF', 'Research Fellow', 'ACS', 'Academic Staff', 'PDOC', 'Post Doctoral Researcher', 'DOCR', 'Doctoral Research Student', 'MRS', 'Master Research Student', 'UND', 'Undergraduate Student', 'TECH', 'Technician', 'SES', 'SESAME Staff') as "Researcher Type"
from users u 
join institutes i on i.id = u.ins_id
order by u.creation_date)where rownum <= 15;

NL Query: من هم المستخدمون الذين لم يشاركوا ابدا في اي مقترحات او تجارب، ومن اي معهد هم وهل حضروا اجتماع المستخدمين الاخير (اشر الى ذلك بـ Y للنعم و N للا لا)؟
SQL Query:
Select u.id as "User ID",
u.name || ' ' ||u.lastname as "User",
i.name as "Institute",
case
when um.usr_id is not null then 'Y'
else 'N'
end as "Applied to UM?"
from users u 
join institutes i on i.id = u.ins_id
left join sup_events_pp um on um.usr_id = u.id
left join proposals p on p.usr_id = u.id
left join participants par on par.usr_id = u.id
where p.usr_id is null and par.usr_id is null;

Schema.proposals:
CREATE TABLE PROPOSALS
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	TITLE VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USER_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	RESEARCH_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	EU_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- EU_support: Y = Yes, N = No
	PHYSICS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- physics: Y = Yes, N = No
	CHEMISTRY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- chemistry: Y = Yes, N = No
	MEDICAL VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- medical: Y = Yes, N = No
	LIFE_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- life_sciences: Y = Yes, N = No
	TECH_INSTRUMENTATION VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- tech_instrumentation: Y = Yes, N = No
	OTHER VARCHAR2(50), 
	SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	PROPOSAL_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- proposal_category: C = Continuation, R = Resubmission, N = New
	APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), -- application_category: N =  Normal,  U = Urgent, L = Long Term
	ENERGY VARCHAR2(255), 
	RESOLUTION VARCHAR2(80), 
	OTHER_REQUIREMENTS VARCHAR2(255), 
	SAMPLE_TREATMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	AVAILABLE_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	ADDITIONAL_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(255), 
	OFFLINE_FACILITIES VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	LOCAL_CONTACT_ID NUMBER, 
	SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	PROP_SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	PREVIOUS_PROPCODE VARCHAR2(32), 
	EU_SUPPORTED VARCHAR2(1), 
	REALSHIFTS NUMBER, 
	DESCRIPTION CLOB, 
	CONTACT_NAME VARCHAR2(90), 
	EARTH_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1), 
	MATERIALS_SCIENCE VARCHAR2(1), 
	PHYSICAL_CHEM VARCHAR2(1), 
	INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION VARCHAR2(1), 
	INS_ID NUMBER, 
	CMT_ID VARCHAR2(30), 
	RESEARCH_AREA VARCHAR2(3), 
	ICTP_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1), 
	USR_LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	REQUIRED_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	FEASIBILITY VARCHAR2(1), -- feasibility: Y = Viable, N = Unfeasible, U = Conflicting, R = Feasible on required beamline, A = Feasible on alternative beamline
	REQ_ALT_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	BML_LOGICAL_OPERATOR VARCHAR2(3), 
	REQ_ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	REQ_APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ALLOCATION_MAIL VARCHAR2(1) DEFAULT null, 
	DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(2), 
	SUB_DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(8), 
	ACHIEVEMENTS CLOB, 
	SEMESTER NUMBER, 
	EU_SUPPORT_CRUCIAL VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULING VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULE_COUNTER NUMBER, 
	LONGTERM_COMMENTS VARCHAR2(220), 
	EMAIL_ACHIEV_EXPREP DATE, 
	EU_REFUNDABLE_DAYS NUMBER, 
	MONTHLY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ICTP_SUPPORTED NUMBER, 
	FACILITY VARCHAR2(1), 
	POLARIZATION VARCHAR2(4), 
	TUNABILITY NUMBER, 
	SAMPLE_TEMPERATURE NUMBER, 
	LAST_MINUTE VARCHAR2(1), 
	BIOSTRUCTX_CODE VARCHAR2(10), 
	IAEA VARCHAR2(1), 
	WAYFORLIGHTS VARCHAR2(1), 
	FERMI_MODE NUMBER, 
	ASSIGNMENT_MAIL VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_FUNDED VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_REQUEST VARCHAR2(20), 
	CULTURAL_HERITAGE VARCHAR2(1), 
	LAST_CHANGE DATE, 
	FUND_SOURCE NUMBER(4,0), 
	NOTES CLOB, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_TECH__000 CHECK (TECH_INSTRUMENTATION IN ('Y', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_RESEA_000 CHECK (RESEARCH_CATEGORY IN ('P','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PROPO_000 CHECK (PROPOSAL_CATEGORY IN ('C', 'R', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHYSI_000 CHECK (PHYSICS IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHCHE_000 CHECK (PHYSICAL_CHEM IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MEDIC_000 CHECK (MEDICAL IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MATER_000 CHECK (MATERIALS_SCIENCE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_LIFE__000 CHECK (LIFE_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_INDUS_000 CHECK (INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EU_SU_000 CHECK (EU_SUPPORT IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_ELECT_000 CHECK (ELECTRON_BEAM IN ('S','M','F')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EARTH_000 CHECK (EARTH_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_CHEMI_000 CHECK (CHEMISTRY IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_APPLI_000 CHECK (APPLICATION_CATEGORY IN ('N','U','L')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_FACILITY FOREIGN KEY (FACILITY)
	  REFERENCES FACILITIES (CODE) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (REQUIRED_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK2 FOREIGN KEY (REQ_ALT_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_INSTITUTES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_BML_FK FOREIGN KEY (BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_CONCTACT_IS_FK FOREIGN KEY (LOCAL_CONTACT_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.STATUS IS 'Label = Status, List= Select code, name from proposals_stataus'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY prio'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.SUB_DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Sub Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM sub_competence'

NL Query: كم عدد الزوار الذين جاؤوا الى سيسامي خلال كل عام؟
SQL Query:
Select distinct extract(year from date_of_arrival) as "Year",
count(id) as "No. of Visits"
from visitors
group by extract(year from date_of_arrival)
order by extract(year from date_of_arrival);

Schema.visitors:
CREATE TABLE VISITORS -- Description: Deatails of visitors and their visit 
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	REQ_DATE DATE DEFAULT sysdate NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	FAMILY_NAME VARCHAR2(60), 
	FIRST_NAME VARCHAR2(200) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	AFFILIATION VARCHAR2(2000) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	COUNTRY VARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	EMAIL VARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	DATE_OF_ARRIVAL DATE NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	TIME_OF_ARRIVAL VARCHAR2(100), 
	DATE_OF_DEPARTURE DATE, 
	NOTES_COMMENTS VARCHAR2(2000), 
	TIME_OF_DEPARTURE VARCHAR2(100), 
	USER_ID NUMBER(5,0) DEFAULT 1001 NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CHECKEDIN VARCHAR2(100), 
	BARCODE NUMBER(5,0) DEFAULT NULL NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT VISITORS_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);

NL Query: كم زيارة تم تسجيلها خلال كل شهر من عام 2017؟
SQL Query:
Select distinct extract(month from date_of_arrival) as "Month",
count(id) as "No. of Visits"
from visitors
where extract(year from date_of_arrival) = 2017
group by extract(month from date_of_arrival)
order by extract(month from date_of_arrival);

NL Query: أي الفصول كان فيها خط الاشعاع BEATS لديه اكثر من 200 وقت حزمة متوفرة؟ فقط ارني رقم الفصل و اجمالي عدد اوقات الحزمة المتوفرة.
SQL Query:
SELECT bt.semester as "Semester",
bt.total_avail as "Total Available Beam Time"
FROM bt_distribution bt 
WHERE bt.total_avail > 200
and bt.bml_short_name='BEATS';

	IN_HOUSE NUMBER, 
	MAJOR_MAINT NUMBER, 
	ILO NUMBER, 
	GU_LT NUMBER, 
	NU_LT NUMBER, 
	AVAIL_LT NUMBER, 
	REQUESTED_LT NUMBER, 
	AVAIL_GU NUMBER, 
	PROPOSALS_GU NUMBER, 
	REQUESTED_GU NUMBER, 
	AVAIL_NU NUMBER, 
	PROPOSALS_NU NUMBER, 
	REQUESTED_NU NUMBER, 
	GU_RATIO NUMBER, 
	NU_RATIO NUMBER, 
	TOTAL_RATIO NUMBER, 
	AVAIL_FB NUMBER, 
	GU_ALREADY_ALLOCATED NUMBER, 
	NU_ALREADY_ALLOCATED NUMBER,

	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (SHORT_NAME) ENABLE
);

NL Query: ما هي المواد المذكورة في ملفات سلامة المقترحات التي قد يكون (او من المؤكد) ان لديها خطر الانفجار وما هي كتلة وصيغة تلك المادة (او المواد)؟ ادرج ايضا معرف المقترح وخط الاشعاع المستضيف فقط.
SQL Query:
Select si.prop_id as "Proposal",
si.substance as "Substance",
si.mass as "Mass",
si.formula as "Formula",
nvl(p.bml_name, required_bml_name) as "Beamline"
from safety_infos si
join proposals p on p.id = si.prop_id
where si.risk in ('U','Y')
and si.explosive = 'Y';

Schema.safety_infos:
CREATE TABLE SAFETY_INFOS 
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	SUBSTANCE VARCHAR2(160) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	FORMULA VARCHAR2(80) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- category: G = Gas, L = Liquid, M = Multilayer, S = Single Crystal, O = Other, B = Biocrystallography, P = Powder, s = Solid
	OTHER_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(30), 
	SAFI_SIZE NUMBER, 
	MASS NUMBER, 
	SURFACE_AREA NUMBER, 
	SPACE_GROUP VARCHAR2(30), 
	CELL_DIMENSIONS VARCHAR2(80), 
	CONTAINER VARCHAR2(60), 
	RISK VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- risk: Y = Yes, N = No, U = Unknown
	RADIOACTIVE VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- radioactive: Y = Yes, N = No
	CORROSIVE VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- corrosive: Y = Yes, N = No
	CONTAMINANT VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- contaminant: Y = Yes, N = No
	BIO_HAZARD VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- bio_hazard: Y = Yes, N = No
	TOXIC VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- toxic: Y = Yes, N = No
	OXIDISING VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- oxidising: Y = Yes, N = No
	COMBUSTIVE VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- combustive: Y = Yes, N = No
	CARCINOGENE VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- carcinogene: Y = Yes, N = No
	INFLAMMABLE VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- inflammable: Y = Yes, N = No
	EXPLOSIVE VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- explosive: Y = Yes, N = No
	EXHAUST_DISPOSAL VARCHAR2(255), 
	SAMPLE_DISPOSAL VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- sample_disposal: R = Removed by user
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE,  -- status: A = Certified , N = Not certified
	PROP_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	SAFETY_STATUS VARCHAR2(1), -- safety_status: N = Not checked, Y = Passed without prescription, W = Warning, P = Passed with prescription
	SAFETY_COMMENT VARCHAR2(255), 
	VOLUME NUMBER, 
	PRESSURE NUMBER, 
	UNATENDED VARCHAR2(10), 
	SUPPLIER VARCHAR2(40), 
	CAS VARCHAR2(15), 
	SAFETY_RECEIVED VARCHAR2(1) DEFAULT 'N', 
	USAGE_ID NUMBER, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_TOXIC_000 CHECK (TOXIC IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_STATU_000 CHECK (STATUS IN ('A','N')) ENABLE,
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_SAMPL_000 CHECK (SAMPLE_DISPOSAL IN ('R','S','D')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_RISK_000 CHECK (RISK IN ('Y','N','U')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_RADIO_000 CHECK (RADIOACTIVE IN ('Y', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_OXIDI_000 CHECK (OXIDISING IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_INFLA_000 CHECK (INFLAMMABLE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_EXPLO_000 CHECK (EXPLOSIVE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_CORRO_000 CHECK (CORROSIVE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_CONTA_000 CHECK (CONTAMINANT='Y' OR CONTAMINANT='N') ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_COMBU_000 CHECK (COMBUSTIVE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_CATEG_000 CHECK (CATEGORY IN ('G','L','M','S','O','B','P','s')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_CARCI_000 CHECK (CARCINOGENE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_BIO_H_000 CHECK (BIO_HAZARD IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT SAFI_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT SAFI_PROP_FK FOREIGN KEY (PROP_ID)
	  REFERENCES PROPOSALS (ID) ENABLE
);

COMMENT ON COLUMN SAFETY_INFOS.CATEGORY IS 'Label=Physical state ,DefList= Other,Powder,Liquid,Single Crystal,Multilayer,Biocrystallography,Gas,Solid ,ValList= O,P,L,S,M,B,G,s'
COMMENT ON COLUMN SAFETY_INFOS.RISK IS 'Label=Risk in sample, preparation or equipment , DefList=Yes,No,Unknown, ValList=Y,N,U'

	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_LIFE__000 CHECK (LIFE_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_INDUS_000 CHECK (INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EU_SU_000 CHECK (EU_SUPPORT IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_ELECT_000 CHECK (ELECTRON_BEAM IN ('S','M','F')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EARTH_000 CHECK (EARTH_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_CHEMI_000 CHECK (CHEMISTRY IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_APPLI_000 CHECK (APPLICATION_CATEGORY IN ('N','U','L')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_FACILITY FOREIGN KEY (FACILITY)
	  REFERENCES FACILITIES (CODE) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (REQUIRED_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK2 FOREIGN KEY (REQ_ALT_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_INSTITUTES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_BML_FK FOREIGN KEY (BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_CONCTACT_IS_FK FOREIGN KEY (LOCAL_CONTACT_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.STATUS IS 'Label = Status, List= Select code, name from proposals_stataus'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY prio'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.SUB_DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Sub Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM sub_competence'

NL Query: هل ذكر في اي من المقترحات المرسلة لخط اشعاع IR مساحة سطح عينة المادة الخاصة بهم؟ اعرض لي اسم مقدم المقترح وعنوان المقترح والمادة التي لديهم وصيغتها وكتلتها ومساحة سطحها.
SQL Query:
Select p.id as "Proposal",
u.name ||' '||u.lastname as "Proposer",
si.substance as "Substance",
si.mass as "Mass",
si.formula as "Formula",
si.surface_area as "Surface Area"
from proposals p
join safety_infos si on p.id = si.prop_id
join users u on u.id = p.usr_id
where (p.bml_name = 'IR' or required_bml_name = 'IR')
and si.surface_area is not null;

Schema.users:
CREATE TABLE USERS
   (	ID NUMBER, 
	NAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	EMAIL VARCHAR2(255), 
	URL VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1), 
	PASSWORD VARCHAR2(20), 
	MAILING VARCHAR2(1), -- mailing: Y = Yes, N = Not Included
	INS_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	PRIVACY VARCHAR2(1), 
	GENDER VARCHAR2(2), 
	NATIONALITY VARCHAR2(4), 
	BIRTH DATE, 
	COMP_1 VARCHAR2(2), 
	COMP_2 VARCHAR2(2), 
	RESEARCHER_TYPE VARCHAR2(4), -- researcher_type: Research Fellow = REF, Academic Staff = ACS, Post Doctoral Researcher = PDOC, Doctoral Research Student = DOCR, Master Research Student = MRS, Undergraduate Student = UND, Technician = TECH, SESAME Staff = SES
	NEW_USER VARCHAR2(2), 
	BIRTH_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	BIRTH_CNT_ID VARCHAR2(4), 
	HOME_ADDR VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_CNT_ID VARCHAR2(4), 
	HOME_ZIP VARCHAR2(10), 
	SAFETY_VIDEO DATE, 
	COD_FISCALE VARCHAR2(16), 
	BIRTH_PROVINCE VARCHAR2(2), 
	BIRTH_TOWN VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_PROVINCE VARCHAR2(2), 
	HOME_TOWN VARCHAR2(50), 
	IDSUBJECT VARCHAR2(16), 
	CREATION_DATE DATE, 
	LAST_ACCESS DATE, 
	EAAHASH VARCHAR2(40), 
	AUDIT_CHANGER NUMBER, 
	AUDIT_ADM_CHANGER NUMBER, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_USERS_STATU_000 CHECK (STATUS IN ('A', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT USR_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT USR_INS_FK FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE
);
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.ID IS 'Sequence=SEQ_USERS_ID,Label=User ID'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NAME IS 'Label=Name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.LASTNAME IS 'Label=Lastname'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.EMAIL IS 'Label=E-mail'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.URL IS 'Label=WWW Home Page'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.STATUS IS 'Label=Validation'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.PASSWORD IS 'Label=Password'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.MAILING IS 'Label=Included in mailing lists'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.INS_ID IS 'Label=Institute'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.GENDER IS 'Label=Gender,vallist=,M,F'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NATIONALITY IS 'Label=Present nationality,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH IS 'Label=Birth date '
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.COMP_1 IS 'Label=Competence 1,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY description'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.COMP_2 IS 'Label=Competence 2 List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY description'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.RESEARCHER_TYPE IS 'Label=Researcher type,deflist=Research Fellow,Academic Staff,Post Doctoral Researcher,Doctoral Research Student,Master Research Student,Undergraduate Student,Technician,SESAME Staff,vallist=REF,ACS,PDOC,DOCR,MRS,UND,TECH,SES'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NEW_USER IS 'Label=New user'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH_CITY IS 'Label=Birth place'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH_CNT_ID IS 'Label=Birth country,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_ADDR IS 'Label=Home address'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_CITY IS 'Label=City'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_CNT_ID IS 'Label=Country,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_ZIP IS 'Label=ZIP code'
Schema.safety_infos:
CREATE TABLE SAFETY_INFOS 
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	SUBSTANCE VARCHAR2(160) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	FORMULA VARCHAR2(80) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- category: G = Gas, L = Liquid, M = Multilayer, S = Single Crystal, O = Other, B = Biocrystallography, P = Powder, s = Solid
	OTHER_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(30), 
	SAFI_SIZE NUMBER, 
	MASS NUMBER, 
	SURFACE_AREA NUMBER, 
	SPACE_GROUP VARCHAR2(30), 
	CELL_DIMENSIONS VARCHAR2(80), 
	CONTAINER VARCHAR2(60), 
	RISK VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- risk: Y = Yes, N = No, U = Unknown
	RADIOACTIVE VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- radioactive: Y = Yes, N = No
	CORROSIVE VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- corrosive: Y = Yes, N = No
	CONTAMINANT VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- contaminant: Y = Yes, N = No
	BIO_HAZARD VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- bio_hazard: Y = Yes, N = No
	TOXIC VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- toxic: Y = Yes, N = No
	OXIDISING VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- oxidising: Y = Yes, N = No
	COMBUSTIVE VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- combustive: Y = Yes, N = No
	CARCINOGENE VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- carcinogene: Y = Yes, N = No
	INFLAMMABLE VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- inflammable: Y = Yes, N = No
	EXPLOSIVE VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- explosive: Y = Yes, N = No
	EXHAUST_DISPOSAL VARCHAR2(255), 
	SAMPLE_DISPOSAL VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- sample_disposal: R = Removed by user
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE,  -- status: A = Certified , N = Not certified
	PROP_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	SAFETY_STATUS VARCHAR2(1), -- safety_status: N = Not checked, Y = Passed without prescription, W = Warning, P = Passed with prescription
	SAFETY_COMMENT VARCHAR2(255), 
	VOLUME NUMBER, 
	PRESSURE NUMBER, 
	UNATENDED VARCHAR2(10), 
	SUPPLIER VARCHAR2(40), 
	CAS VARCHAR2(15), 
	SAFETY_RECEIVED VARCHAR2(1) DEFAULT 'N', 
	USAGE_ID NUMBER, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_TOXIC_000 CHECK (TOXIC IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_STATU_000 CHECK (STATUS IN ('A','N')) ENABLE,
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_SAMPL_000 CHECK (SAMPLE_DISPOSAL IN ('R','S','D')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_RISK_000 CHECK (RISK IN ('Y','N','U')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_RADIO_000 CHECK (RADIOACTIVE IN ('Y', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_OXIDI_000 CHECK (OXIDISING IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_INFLA_000 CHECK (INFLAMMABLE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_EXPLO_000 CHECK (EXPLOSIVE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_CORRO_000 CHECK (CORROSIVE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_CONTA_000 CHECK (CONTAMINANT='Y' OR CONTAMINANT='N') ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_COMBU_000 CHECK (COMBUSTIVE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_CATEG_000 CHECK (CATEGORY IN ('G','L','M','S','O','B','P','s')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_CARCI_000 CHECK (CARCINOGENE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_SAFET_BIO_H_000 CHECK (BIO_HAZARD IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT SAFI_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT SAFI_PROP_FK FOREIGN KEY (PROP_ID)
	  REFERENCES PROPOSALS (ID) ENABLE
);

COMMENT ON COLUMN SAFETY_INFOS.CATEGORY IS 'Label=Physical state ,DefList= Other,Powder,Liquid,Single Crystal,Multilayer,Biocrystallography,Gas,Solid ,ValList= O,P,L,S,M,B,G,s'
COMMENT ON COLUMN SAFETY_INFOS.RISK IS 'Label=Risk in sample, preparation or equipment , DefList=Yes,No,Unknown, ValList=Y,N,U'
Schema.proposals:
CREATE TABLE PROPOSALS
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	TITLE VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USER_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	RESEARCH_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	EU_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- EU_support: Y = Yes, N = No
	PHYSICS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- physics: Y = Yes, N = No
	CHEMISTRY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- chemistry: Y = Yes, N = No
	MEDICAL VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- medical: Y = Yes, N = No
	LIFE_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- life_sciences: Y = Yes, N = No
	TECH_INSTRUMENTATION VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- tech_instrumentation: Y = Yes, N = No
	OTHER VARCHAR2(50), 
	SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	PROPOSAL_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- proposal_category: C = Continuation, R = Resubmission, N = New
	APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), -- application_category: N =  Normal,  U = Urgent, L = Long Term
	ENERGY VARCHAR2(255), 
	RESOLUTION VARCHAR2(80), 
	OTHER_REQUIREMENTS VARCHAR2(255), 
	SAMPLE_TREATMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	AVAILABLE_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	ADDITIONAL_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(255), 
	OFFLINE_FACILITIES VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	LOCAL_CONTACT_ID NUMBER, 
	SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	PROP_SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	PREVIOUS_PROPCODE VARCHAR2(32), 
	EU_SUPPORTED VARCHAR2(1), 
	REALSHIFTS NUMBER, 
	DESCRIPTION CLOB, 
	CONTACT_NAME VARCHAR2(90), 
	EARTH_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1), 
	MATERIALS_SCIENCE VARCHAR2(1), 
	PHYSICAL_CHEM VARCHAR2(1), 
	INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION VARCHAR2(1), 
	INS_ID NUMBER, 
	CMT_ID VARCHAR2(30), 
	RESEARCH_AREA VARCHAR2(3), 
	ICTP_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1), 
	USR_LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	REQUIRED_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	FEASIBILITY VARCHAR2(1), -- feasibility: Y = Viable, N = Unfeasible, U = Conflicting, R = Feasible on required beamline, A = Feasible on alternative beamline
	REQ_ALT_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	BML_LOGICAL_OPERATOR VARCHAR2(3), 
	REQ_ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	REQ_APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ALLOCATION_MAIL VARCHAR2(1) DEFAULT null, 
	DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(2), 
	SUB_DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(8), 
	ACHIEVEMENTS CLOB, 
	SEMESTER NUMBER, 
	EU_SUPPORT_CRUCIAL VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULING VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULE_COUNTER NUMBER, 
	LONGTERM_COMMENTS VARCHAR2(220), 
	EMAIL_ACHIEV_EXPREP DATE, 
	EU_REFUNDABLE_DAYS NUMBER, 
	MONTHLY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ICTP_SUPPORTED NUMBER, 
	FACILITY VARCHAR2(1), 
	POLARIZATION VARCHAR2(4), 
	TUNABILITY NUMBER, 
	SAMPLE_TEMPERATURE NUMBER, 
	LAST_MINUTE VARCHAR2(1), 
	BIOSTRUCTX_CODE VARCHAR2(10), 
	IAEA VARCHAR2(1), 
	WAYFORLIGHTS VARCHAR2(1), 
	FERMI_MODE NUMBER, 
	ASSIGNMENT_MAIL VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_FUNDED VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_REQUEST VARCHAR2(20), 
	CULTURAL_HERITAGE VARCHAR2(1), 
	LAST_CHANGE DATE, 
	FUND_SOURCE NUMBER(4,0), 
	NOTES CLOB, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_TECH__000 CHECK (TECH_INSTRUMENTATION IN ('Y', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_RESEA_000 CHECK (RESEARCH_CATEGORY IN ('P','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PROPO_000 CHECK (PROPOSAL_CATEGORY IN ('C', 'R', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHYSI_000 CHECK (PHYSICS IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHCHE_000 CHECK (PHYSICAL_CHEM IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MEDIC_000 CHECK (MEDICAL IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MATER_000 CHECK (MATERIALS_SCIENCE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_LIFE__000 CHECK (LIFE_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_INDUS_000 CHECK (INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EU_SU_000 CHECK (EU_SUPPORT IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_ELECT_000 CHECK (ELECTRON_BEAM IN ('S','M','F')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EARTH_000 CHECK (EARTH_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_CHEMI_000 CHECK (CHEMISTRY IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_APPLI_000 CHECK (APPLICATION_CATEGORY IN ('N','U','L')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_FACILITY FOREIGN KEY (FACILITY)
	  REFERENCES FACILITIES (CODE) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (REQUIRED_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK2 FOREIGN KEY (REQ_ALT_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_INSTITUTES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_BML_FK FOREIGN KEY (BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_CONCTACT_IS_FK FOREIGN KEY (LOCAL_CONTACT_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.STATUS IS 'Label = Status, List= Select code, name from proposals_stataus'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY prio'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.SUB_DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Sub Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM sub_competence'

NL Query: ل يمكنك اعطائي قائمة باسم ودولة ومدينة كل معهد مصنف نوعه كـ (اخر/other)؟
SQL Query:
Select name as "Institute",
cnt_name as "Country",
city as "City"
from institutes 
where ins_type = 'OTH';

Schema.institutes:
CREATE TABLE INSTITUTES

	ZIP VARCHAR2(20) NOT NULL ENABLE,

   COMMENT ON COLUMN INSTITUTES.INS_TYPE IS 'Label=Institute Type, List=select code, description from list_of_values where list = ''InstituteType'''

NL Query: كم عدد طلبات التقديم لاحدث UM كانت مرتبطة بالتعاون الصناعي وكم عددها مرتبط بالتراث الثقافي وما هو العدد الاجمالي للطلبات؟
SQL Query:
Select count(case when industry_collaboration = 'Y' then id end) as "No. of Industry",
count(case when cultural_heritage = 'Y' then id end) as "No. of Cultural Heritage",
count(id) as "Total Applications"
from sup_events_pp;

NL Query: اي ثلاثة دول (دولة معهد المستخدم) سجلت اكبر عدد من المتقدمين لاجتماع المستخدمين السادس عشر.
SQL Query:
Select * from
(Select i.cnt_name as "Country",
count(um16.id) as "No. of Applications"
from sup_events_pp_16um um16
join institutes i on i.id = um16.ins_id
group by i.cnt_name
order by count(um16.id) desc) where rownum <= 3;

NL Query: اي لجنة لديها اكبر عدد من المقترحات المرفوضة مع احتساب جميع الفصول؟
SQL Query:
Select * from
(Select nvl(cmt_id, research_area) as "Committee",
count(case when status = 'N' then id end) as "Rejected Proposals"
from proposals
group by nvl(cmt_id, research_area) 
order by count(case when status = 'N' then id end) desc
) where rownum = 1;

NL Query: من هم المستخدمون الذين لا يوافقون على ادراج اسمائهم واسماء معاهدهم في التقرير السنوي في جميع الحالات (بغض النظر عما اذا كانوا قد شاركوا او لم يشاركوا مع المنشأة)، ادرج اسماءهم وجنسياتهم وايميلاتهم ومعاهدهم ودولة المعهد
SQL Query:
Select u.id as "User ID",
u.name ||' '||u.lastname as "User",
u.email as "E-mail",
c.name as "Nationality",
i.name as "Institute",
i.cnt_name as "Country"
from users u 
join institutes i on i.id = u.ins_id
join countries c on c.code = u.nationality
join sup_personal_data_form_t pt on pt.usr_id = u.id
where pt.case1a = 'N'
and pt.case2a = 'N'
and pt.case2b = 'N'
and pt.case4a = 'N'
and pt.case3a = 'N'
and pt.case3b = 'N'
and pt.case5a = 'N'
and pt.case5b = 'N'
and pt.case6a = 'N'
and pt.case6b = 'N'
and pt.case7a = 'N'
and pt.case8a = 'N'
and pt.case8b = 'N';

Schema.sup_personal_data_form_t:
CREATE TABLE SUP_PERSONAL_DATA_FORM_T -- Description: Consent/Authorize name and institution to appear in the Annual Scientific Report for Member Countries.
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER, 
	REG_DATE DATE, 
	CASE1A VARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CASE2A VARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CASE2B VARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CASE3A VARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CASE3B VARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CASE4A VARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CASE5A VARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CASE5B VARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CASE6A VARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CASE6B VARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CASE7A VARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- Case7: User never participated in experiments or beamtimes but attended at least 1 users' meeting
	CASE7B VARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CASE8A VARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- Case8: User never participated in experiments, beamtimes or any users' meetings
	CASE8B VARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	AUD_CHANGER NUMBER DEFAULT -1 NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT SUP_PERSONAL_DATA_FORM_T_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);

	NEW_USER VARCHAR2(2),

   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.RESEARCHER_TYPE IS 'Label=Researcher type,deflist=Research Fellow,Academic Staff,Post Doctoral Researcher,Doctoral Research Student,Master Research Student,Undergraduate Student,Technician,SESAME Staff,vallist=REF,ACS,PDOC,DOCR,MRS,UND,TECH,SES'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NEW_USER IS 'Label=New user'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH_CITY IS 'Label=Birth place'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH_CNT_ID IS 'Label=Birth country,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_ADDR IS 'Label=Home address'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_CITY IS 'Label=City'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_CNT_ID IS 'Label=Country,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_ZIP IS 'Label=ZIP code'

NL Query: اي من المقترحات الجديدة المخصصة لخطوط اشعاع XAFS او MS/XPD هي مقترحات طويلة الامد (Long term proposals)؟ ادرج اسم صاحب المقترح والعنوان وخط الاشعاع والجدوى والحالة الحالية.
SQL Query:
Select p.id as "Proposal",
u.name ||' '||u.lastname as "Proposer",
p.title as "Title", 
nvl(p.bml_name, required_bml_name) as "Beamline",
DECODE(p.FEASIBILITY,NULL,'---','Y','Viable','N','Unfeasible','U','Conflicting', 'R','Feasible on required beamline','A','Feasible on alternative beamline') AS "Feasibility",
ps.name as "Status"
from proposals p
join users u on u.id = p.usr_id
join proposals_status ps on ps.code = p.status
where (nvl(p.bml_name, required_bml_name) = 'XAFS/XRF'
or nvl(p.bml_name, required_bml_name) = 'MS/XPD')
and p.semester = (select max(p1.semester) from proposals p1)
and p.application_category = 'L';

NL Query: هل قدم اي شخص طلبا للوصول الى مختبر خط اشعاع IR لمدة تزيد عن 3 ايام؟ ما هو وقت وصولهم ومغادرتهم وما هو اسم صاحب المقترح وعنوانه واي فصل كان؟ اعرض معرف المقترح ومعرف الطلب وعدد الايام ايضا.
SQL Query:
Select a.access_id as "Access ID",
p.id as "Proposal ID",
u.name ||' '||u.lastname as "Proposer",
p.title as "Title",
(a.departure - a.arrival) as "Days",
a.arrival as "Date of Arrival",
a.departure as "Date of Departure",
p.semester as "Semester"
from accesses a 
join proposals p on p.id = a.prop_id
join users u on u.id = a.usr_id
where (a.departure - a.arrival) > 3;

Schema.accesses:
CREATE TABLE ACCESSES --Description: Lab Access Requests
   (	ACCESS_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	PROP_ID VARCHAR2(15), 
	ARRIVAL DATE, 
	DEPARTURE DATE, 
	USER_TYPE VARCHAR2(5) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	BML_NAME VARCHAR2(30), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	INS_ID NUMBER, 
	SUBMISSION_DATE DATE NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	DESCRIPTION VARCHAR2(400), 
	LAB_NAME VARCHAR2(100), 
	RESEARCHER_TYPE VARCHAR2(4), 
	GUEST_NET VARCHAR2(1), 
	FACILITY VARCHAR2(1), 
	VIDEO_ELETTRA VARCHAR2(1), 
	VIDEO_FERMI VARCHAR2(1), 
	 CONSTRAINT PK_ACCESSES PRIMARY KEY (ACCESS_ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_ACCESSES_USR_ID FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT FK_INS_ID FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE
);

	COMMENT ON COLUMN ACCESSES.STATUS IS 'Label=Status, List=select code, description from list_of_values where list = ''AccessStatus'''
	COMMENT ON COLUMN ACCESSES.USER_TYPE IS 'Label=Status, List=select code, description from list_of_values where list = ''UserTypes'''

CREATE TABLE PROPOSALS
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	TITLE VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USER_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	RESEARCH_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	EU_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- EU_support: Y = Yes, N = No
	PHYSICS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- physics: Y = Yes, N = No
	CHEMISTRY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- chemistry: Y = Yes, N = No
	MEDICAL VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- medical: Y = Yes, N = No
	LIFE_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- life_sciences: Y = Yes, N = No
	TECH_INSTRUMENTATION VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- tech_instrumentation: Y = Yes, N = No
	OTHER VARCHAR2(50), 
	SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	PROPOSAL_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- proposal_category: C = Continuation, R = Resubmission, N = New
	APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), -- application_category: N =  Normal,  U = Urgent, L = Long Term
	ENERGY VARCHAR2(255), 
	RESOLUTION VARCHAR2(80), 
	OTHER_REQUIREMENTS VARCHAR2(255), 
	SAMPLE_TREATMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	AVAILABLE_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	ADDITIONAL_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(255), 
	OFFLINE_FACILITIES VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	LOCAL_CONTACT_ID NUMBER, 
	SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	PROP_SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	PREVIOUS_PROPCODE VARCHAR2(32), 
	EU_SUPPORTED VARCHAR2(1), 
	REALSHIFTS NUMBER, 
	DESCRIPTION CLOB, 
	CONTACT_NAME VARCHAR2(90), 
	EARTH_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1), 
	MATERIALS_SCIENCE VARCHAR2(1), 
	PHYSICAL_CHEM VARCHAR2(1), 
	INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION VARCHAR2(1),

	EU_SUPPORT_CRUCIAL VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULING VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULE_COUNTER NUMBER, 
	LONGTERM_COMMENTS VARCHAR2(220), 
	EMAIL_ACHIEV_EXPREP DATE, 
	EU_REFUNDABLE_DAYS NUMBER,

	ICTP_SUPPORTED NUMBER, 
	FACILITY VARCHAR2(1), 
	POLARIZATION VARCHAR2(4), 
	TUNABILITY NUMBER, 
	SAMPLE_TEMPERATURE NUMBER, 
	LAST_MINUTE VARCHAR2(1), 
	BIOSTRUCTX_CODE VARCHAR2(10), 
	IAEA VARCHAR2(1), 
	WAYFORLIGHTS VARCHAR2(1), 
	FERMI_MODE NUMBER, 
	ASSIGNMENT_MAIL VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_FUNDED VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_REQUEST VARCHAR2(20), 
	CULTURAL_HERITAGE VARCHAR2(1), 
	LAST_CHANGE DATE, 
	FUND_SOURCE NUMBER(4,0), 
	NOTES CLOB, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_TECH__000 CHECK (TECH_INSTRUMENTATION IN ('Y', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_RESEA_000 CHECK (RESEARCH_CATEGORY IN ('P','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PROPO_000 CHECK (PROPOSAL_CATEGORY IN ('C', 'R', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHYSI_000 CHECK (PHYSICS IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHCHE_000 CHECK (PHYSICAL_CHEM IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MEDIC_000 CHECK (MEDICAL IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MATER_000 CHECK (MATERIALS_SCIENCE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_LIFE__000 CHECK (LIFE_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_INDUS_000 CHECK (INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EU_SU_000 CHECK (EU_SUPPORT IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_ELECT_000 CHECK (ELECTRON_BEAM IN ('S','M','F')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EARTH_000 CHECK (EARTH_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_CHEMI_000 CHECK (CHEMISTRY IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_APPLI_000 CHECK (APPLICATION_CATEGORY IN ('N','U','L')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_FACILITY FOREIGN KEY (FACILITY)
	  REFERENCES FACILITIES (CODE) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (REQUIRED_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK2 FOREIGN KEY (REQ_ALT_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE,

	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_BML_FK FOREIGN KEY (BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_CONCTACT_IS_FK FOREIGN KEY (LOCAL_CONTACT_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE,

);

	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY prio'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.SUB_DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Sub Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM sub_competence'

NL Query: قارن عدد المقترحات التي طلبت دعما ماليا بالتي لم تطلب في كل فصل، واعرض العدد الاجمالي للمقترحات ايضا.
SQL Query:
Select semester as "Semester",
count(case when fund_source is not null then id end) as "Proposals with Fund",
count(case when fund_source is null then id end) as "Proposals w/o Fund",
count(id) as "All Proposals"
from proposals
group by semester;

NL Query: ما اسماء الدول التي يحمل جنسيتها على الأقل 10 مستخدمين؟ وكم مستخدما يوجد لدى كل منها
SQL Query:
Select c.name as "Country",
count(u.id) as "No. of Users"
from users u
join countries c on c.code = u.nationality
group by c.name
having count(u.id) >= 10;

Schema.countries:
CREATE TABLE COUNTRIES 
   (	NAME VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	CODE VARCHAR2(4) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	EU VARCHAR2(1), 
	IBAN_LEN NUMBER, 
	CONT_CODE VARCHAR2(2), 
	ACCOUNT_POSITION NUMBER, 
	ACCOUNT_LENGTH NUMBER, 
	CERIC VARCHAR2(1), 
	 CONSTRAINT CNT_PK PRIMARY KEY (CODE, NAME)
);
   COMMENT ON COLUMN COUNTRIES.NAME IS 'Label=Country'
Schema.users:
CREATE TABLE USERS
   (	ID NUMBER, 
	NAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	EMAIL VARCHAR2(255), 
	URL VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1), 
	PASSWORD VARCHAR2(20), 
	MAILING VARCHAR2(1), -- mailing: Y = Yes, N = Not Included
	INS_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	PRIVACY VARCHAR2(1), 
	GENDER VARCHAR2(2), 
	NATIONALITY VARCHAR2(4), 
	BIRTH DATE, 
	COMP_1 VARCHAR2(2), 
	COMP_2 VARCHAR2(2), 
	RESEARCHER_TYPE VARCHAR2(4), -- researcher_type: Research Fellow = REF, Academic Staff = ACS, Post Doctoral Researcher = PDOC, Doctoral Research Student = DOCR, Master Research Student = MRS, Undergraduate Student = UND, Technician = TECH, SESAME Staff = SES
	NEW_USER VARCHAR2(2), 
	BIRTH_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	BIRTH_CNT_ID VARCHAR2(4), 
	HOME_ADDR VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_CITY VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_CNT_ID VARCHAR2(4), 
	HOME_ZIP VARCHAR2(10), 
	SAFETY_VIDEO DATE, 
	COD_FISCALE VARCHAR2(16), 
	BIRTH_PROVINCE VARCHAR2(2), 
	BIRTH_TOWN VARCHAR2(50), 
	HOME_PROVINCE VARCHAR2(2), 
	HOME_TOWN VARCHAR2(50), 
	IDSUBJECT VARCHAR2(16), 
	CREATION_DATE DATE, 
	LAST_ACCESS DATE, 
	EAAHASH VARCHAR2(40), 
	AUDIT_CHANGER NUMBER, 
	AUDIT_ADM_CHANGER NUMBER, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_USERS_STATU_000 CHECK (STATUS IN ('A', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT USR_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT USR_INS_FK FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE
);
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.ID IS 'Sequence=SEQ_USERS_ID,Label=User ID'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NAME IS 'Label=Name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.LASTNAME IS 'Label=Lastname'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.EMAIL IS 'Label=E-mail'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.URL IS 'Label=WWW Home Page'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.STATUS IS 'Label=Validation'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.PASSWORD IS 'Label=Password'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.MAILING IS 'Label=Included in mailing lists'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.INS_ID IS 'Label=Institute'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.GENDER IS 'Label=Gender,vallist=,M,F'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NATIONALITY IS 'Label=Present nationality,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH IS 'Label=Birth date '
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.COMP_1 IS 'Label=Competence 1,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY description'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.COMP_2 IS 'Label=Competence 2 List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY description'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.RESEARCHER_TYPE IS 'Label=Researcher type,deflist=Research Fellow,Academic Staff,Post Doctoral Researcher,Doctoral Research Student,Master Research Student,Undergraduate Student,Technician,SESAME Staff,vallist=REF,ACS,PDOC,DOCR,MRS,UND,TECH,SES'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.NEW_USER IS 'Label=New user'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH_CITY IS 'Label=Birth place'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.BIRTH_CNT_ID IS 'Label=Birth country,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_ADDR IS 'Label=Home address'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_CITY IS 'Label=City'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_CNT_ID IS 'Label=Country,List=SELECT code, name FROM countries ORDER BY name'
   COMMENT ON COLUMN USERS.HOME_ZIP IS 'Label=ZIP code'

NL Query: ما هي المقترحات التي قيمتها لجنة AHS ولم تصل إلى الحد الادنى للقبول خلال الفصل السادس؟ ادرج فقط المقدم والعنوان والدرجة والحالة.
SQL Query:
Select p.id as "Proposal ID",
u.name ||' '||u.lastname as "Proposer",
p.title as "Title",
ev.final_score as "Score",
ps.name as "Status"
from proposals p
join users u on u.id = p.usr_id
join evaluations ev on ev.prop_id = p.id and ev.evlt_id = 3
join proposals_status ps on ps.code = p.status
join proposals_threshold pth on pth.sem = p.semester
where nvl(p.cmt_id, p.research_area) = 'AHS'
and p.semester = 6
and ev.final_score < pth.threshold;

Schema.evaluations:
CREATE TABLE EVALUATIONS -- Description: Proposals evaluation
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	SCORE NUMBER(38,0), 
	COMMENTS CLOB, 
	PROP_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	EVLT_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	RELEVANCE NUMBER, 
	ORIGINALITY NUMBER, 
	LOWRISK NUMBER, 
	NEEDELETTRA NUMBER, 
	PREVRECORD NUMBER, 
	TECHNICAL_EVLT VARCHAR2(1), 
	BML_OR_CMT VARCHAR2(25), 
	REALSHIFTS NUMBER, 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1), 
	FINAL_SCORE NUMBER(4,2), 
	WEIGHTEDAVERAGE NUMBER(4,2), 
	COMPETENCE NUMBER(4,0), 
	QUARTER VARCHAR2(10), 
	APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	INTERNAL_COMMENTS CLOB, 
	REEDITING VARCHAR2(1), 
	REEDIT_COMMENTS CLOB, 
	 CONSTRAINT EVAL_UNIQUE UNIQUE (PROP_ID, USR_ID, EVLT_ID, BML_OR_CMT)
    
	 CONSTRAINT EVAL_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT EVAL_EVLT_FK FOREIGN KEY (EVLT_ID)
	  REFERENCES EVALUATION_TYPES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT EVAL_PROP_FK FOREIGN KEY (PROP_ID)
	  REFERENCES PROPOSALS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT EVAL_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);
Schema.proposals:
CREATE TABLE PROPOSALS
   (	ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	TITLE VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USER_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	RESEARCH_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	EU_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- EU_support: Y = Yes, N = No
	PHYSICS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- physics: Y = Yes, N = No
	CHEMISTRY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- chemistry: Y = Yes, N = No
	MEDICAL VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- medical: Y = Yes, N = No
	LIFE_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- life_sciences: Y = Yes, N = No
	TECH_INSTRUMENTATION VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- tech_instrumentation: Y = Yes, N = No
	OTHER VARCHAR2(50), 
	SHIFTS NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	PROPOSAL_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, -- proposal_category: C = Continuation, R = Resubmission, N = New
	APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), -- application_category: N =  Normal,  U = Urgent, L = Long Term
	ENERGY VARCHAR2(255), 
	RESOLUTION VARCHAR2(80), 
	OTHER_REQUIREMENTS VARCHAR2(255), 
	SAMPLE_TREATMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	AVAILABLE_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(400), 
	ADDITIONAL_EQUIPMENT VARCHAR2(255), 
	OFFLINE_FACILITIES VARCHAR2(255), 
	STATUS VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	USR_ID NUMBER NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	LOCAL_CONTACT_ID NUMBER, 
	SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	PROP_SUBMISSION_DATE DATE, 
	PREVIOUS_PROPCODE VARCHAR2(32), 
	EU_SUPPORTED VARCHAR2(1), 
	REALSHIFTS NUMBER, 
	DESCRIPTION CLOB, 
	CONTACT_NAME VARCHAR2(90), 
	EARTH_SCIENCES VARCHAR2(1), 
	MATERIALS_SCIENCE VARCHAR2(1), 
	PHYSICAL_CHEM VARCHAR2(1), 
	INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION VARCHAR2(1), 
	INS_ID NUMBER, 
	CMT_ID VARCHAR2(30), 
	RESEARCH_AREA VARCHAR2(3), 
	ICTP_SUPPORT VARCHAR2(1), 
	USR_LASTNAME VARCHAR2(40), 
	REQUIRED_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	FEASIBILITY VARCHAR2(1), -- feasibility: Y = Viable, N = Unfeasible, U = Conflicting, R = Feasible on required beamline, A = Feasible on alternative beamline
	REQ_ALT_BML_NAME VARCHAR2(25), 
	BML_LOGICAL_OPERATOR VARCHAR2(3), 
	REQ_ELECTRON_BEAM VARCHAR2(1), 
	REQ_APPLICATION_CATEGORY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ALLOCATION_MAIL VARCHAR2(1) DEFAULT null, 
	DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(2), 
	SUB_DISCIPLINE VARCHAR2(8), 
	ACHIEVEMENTS CLOB, 
	SEMESTER NUMBER, 
	EU_SUPPORT_CRUCIAL VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULING VARCHAR2(1), 
	AUTOSCHEDULE_COUNTER NUMBER, 
	LONGTERM_COMMENTS VARCHAR2(220), 
	EMAIL_ACHIEV_EXPREP DATE, 
	EU_REFUNDABLE_DAYS NUMBER, 
	MONTHLY VARCHAR2(1), 
	ICTP_SUPPORTED NUMBER, 
	FACILITY VARCHAR2(1), 
	POLARIZATION VARCHAR2(4), 
	TUNABILITY NUMBER, 
	SAMPLE_TEMPERATURE NUMBER, 
	LAST_MINUTE VARCHAR2(1), 
	BIOSTRUCTX_CODE VARCHAR2(10), 
	IAEA VARCHAR2(1), 
	WAYFORLIGHTS VARCHAR2(1), 
	FERMI_MODE NUMBER, 
	ASSIGNMENT_MAIL VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_FUNDED VARCHAR2(1), 
	LASERLAB_REQUEST VARCHAR2(20), 
	CULTURAL_HERITAGE VARCHAR2(1), 
	LAST_CHANGE DATE, 
	FUND_SOURCE NUMBER(4,0), 
	NOTES CLOB, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_TECH__000 CHECK (TECH_INSTRUMENTATION IN ('Y', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_RESEA_000 CHECK (RESEARCH_CATEGORY IN ('P','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PROPO_000 CHECK (PROPOSAL_CATEGORY IN ('C', 'R', 'N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHYSI_000 CHECK (PHYSICS IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_PHCHE_000 CHECK (PHYSICAL_CHEM IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MEDIC_000 CHECK (MEDICAL IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_MATER_000 CHECK (MATERIALS_SCIENCE IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_LIFE__000 CHECK (LIFE_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_INDUS_000 CHECK (INDUSTRY_COLLABORATION IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EU_SU_000 CHECK (EU_SUPPORT IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_ELECT_000 CHECK (ELECTRON_BEAM IN ('S','M','F')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_EARTH_000 CHECK (EARTH_SCIENCES IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_CHEMI_000 CHECK (CHEMISTRY IN ('Y','N')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT AVCON_PROPO_APPLI_000 CHECK (APPLICATION_CATEGORY IN ('N','U','L')) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
    
	 CONSTRAINT FK_FACILITY FOREIGN KEY (FACILITY)
	  REFERENCES FACILITIES (CODE) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (REQUIRED_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_BEAMLINES_FK2 FOREIGN KEY (REQ_ALT_BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROPOSALS_INSTITUTES_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (INS_ID)
	  REFERENCES INSTITUTES (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_BML_FK FOREIGN KEY (BML_NAME)
	  REFERENCES BEAMLINES (NAME) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_CONCTACT_IS_FK FOREIGN KEY (LOCAL_CONTACT_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE, 
	 CONSTRAINT PROP_USR_FK FOREIGN KEY (USR_ID)
	  REFERENCES USERS (ID) ENABLE
);
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.STATUS IS 'Label = Status, List= Select code, name from proposals_stataus'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM competence ORDER BY prio'
	COMMENT ON COLUMN PROPOSALS.SUB_DISCIPLINE IS 'Label=Sub Discipline ,List=SELECT code, description FROM sub_competence'

NL Query: اي لجنة قامت بمراجعة/تقييم أكثر من 50 مقترحا خلال الفصل الرابع؟
SQL Query:
Select nvl(cmt_id, research_area) as "Committee",
count(id) as "No. of Proposals"
from proposals
where semester = 4
group by nvl(cmt_id, research_area)
having count(id) > 50;
